title: GSEA Plot — GSEAPlot
text: function generates various types plots Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA) results.

title: GSEA Plot — GSEAPlot
code: GSEAPlot(   srt,   db = "GO_BP",   group.by = NULL,   test.use = "wilcox",   res = NULL,   plot_type = c("line", "bar", "network", "enrichmap", "wordcloud", "comparison"),   group_use = NULL,   id_use = NULL,   pvalueCutoff = NULL,   padjustCutoff = 0.05,   topTerm = ifelse(plot_type == "enrichmap", 100, 6),   direction = c("pos", "neg", "both"),   compare_only_sig = FALSE,   topWord = 100,   word_type = c("term", "feature"),   word_size = c(2, 8),   words_excluded = NULL,   line_width = 1.5,   line_alpha = 1,   line_color = "#6BB82D",   n_coregene = 10,   sample_coregene = FALSE,   features_label = NULL,   label.fg = "black",   label.bg = "white",   label.bg.r = 0.1,   label.size = 4,   network_layout = "fr",   network_labelsize = 5,   network_blendmode = "blend",   network_layoutadjust = TRUE,   network_adjscale = 60,   network_adjiter = 100,   enrichmap_layout = "fr",   enrichmap_cluster = "fast_greedy",   enrichmap_label = c("term", "feature"),   enrichmap_labelsize = 5,   enrlichmap_nlabel = 4,   enrichmap_show_keyword = FALSE,   enrichmap_mark = c("ellipse", "hull"),   enrichmap_expand = c(0.5, 0.5),   character_width = 50,   lineheight = 0.7,   palette = "Spectral",   palcolor = NULL,   aspect.ratio = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: GSEA Plot — GSEAPlot
text: srt Seurat object containing results RunDEtest RunGSEA. specified, GSEA results extracted Seurat object automatically. specified, res arguments must provided. db database use enrichment plot. Default "GO_BP". group.character vector specifying grouping variable Seurat object. argument used srt specified. test.use character vector specifying test used differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. res Enrichment results generated RunGSEA function. provided, 'srt', 'test.use' 'group.' ignored. plot_type type plot generate. Options : "line", "comparison", "bar", "network", "enrichmap", "wordcloud". Default "line". group_use group(s) used enrichment plot. Default NULL. id_use List IDs used display specific terms enrichment plot. Default value NULL. pvalueCutoff p-value cutoff. work padjustCutoff NULL. Default NULL. padjustCutoff p-adjusted cutoff. Default 0.05. topTerm number top terms display. Default 6, 100 plot_type "enrichmap". direction direction enrichment include plot. Must one "pos", "neg", "". Default "". compare_only_sig Whether compare significant terms. Default FALSE. topWord number top words display wordcloud. Default 100. word_type type words display wordcloud. Options "term" "feature". Default "term". word_size size range words wordcloud. Default c(2, 8). words_excluded Words excluded wordcloud. Default NULL, means built-words (words_excluded) used. line_width linewidth line plot. line_alpha alpha value line plot. line_color color line plot. n_coregene number core genes label line plot. sample_coregene Whether randomly sample core genes labeling line plot. features_label character vector feature names include labels line plot. label.fg color labels. label.bg background color labels. label.bg.r radius rounding label's background. label.size size labels. network_layout layout algorithm use network plot. Options "fr", "kk", "random", "circle", "tree", "grid", algorithm igraph package. Default "fr". network_labelsize label size network plot. Default 5. network_blendmode blend mode network plot. Default "blend". network_layoutadjust Whether adjust layout network plot avoid overlapping words. Default TRUE. network_adjscale scale adjusting network plot layout. Default 60. network_adjiter number iterations adjusting network plot layout. Default 100. enrichmap_layout layout algorithm use enrichmap plot. Options "fr", "kk", "random", "circle", "tree", "grid", algorithm igraph package. Default "fr". enrichmap_cluster clustering algorithm use enrichmap plot. Options "walktrap", "fast_greedy", algorithm igraph package. Default "fast_greedy". enrichmap_label label type enrichmap plot. Options "term" "feature". Default "term". enrichmap_labelsize label size enrichmap plot. Default 5. enrlichmap_nlabel number labels display cluster enrichmap plot. Default 4. enrichmap_show_keyword Whether show keyword terms features enrichmap plot. Default FALSE. enrichmap_mark mark shape enrichmap plot. Options "ellipse" "hull". Default "ellipse". enrichmap_expand expansion factor enrichmap plot. Default c(0.5, 0.5). character_width maximum width character descriptions. Default 50. lineheight line height y-axis labels. Default 0.7. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Spectral". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

what: Gene ID conversion function using biomart — GeneConvert
title: Gene ID conversion function using biomart — GeneConvert
text: function can convert different gene ID types within one species two species using biomart service.

title: Gene ID conversion function using biomart — GeneConvert
code: GeneConvert(   geneID,   geneID_from_IDtype = "symbol",   geneID_to_IDtype = "entrez_id",   species_from = "Homo_sapiens",   species_to = NULL,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   biomart = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   max_tries = 5,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Gene ID conversion function using biomart — GeneConvert
text: geneID vector geneID character. geneID_from_IDtype Gene ID type input geneID. e.g. "symbol", "ensembl_id", "entrez_id" geneID_to_IDtype Gene ID type(s) convert . e.g. "symbol", "ensembl_id", "entrez_id". species_from Latin names animals input geneID. e.g. "Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus". species_to Latin names animals output geneID. e.g. "Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus". Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. biomart name BioMart database want connect . Possible options include "ensembl", "protists_mart", "fungi_mart", "plants_mart". mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". max_tries maximum number attempts connect BioMart service. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Gene ID conversion function using biomart — GeneConvert
text: list following elements: geneID_res: data.frame contains gene IDs mapped database columns: "from_IDtype", "from_geneID", "to_IDtype", "to_geneID". geneID_collapse: data.frame contains successfully converted gene IDs, output gene IDs collapsed list. result, "from_geneID" column (set row names) data.frame unique. geneID_expand: data.frame contains successfully converted gene IDs, output gene IDs expanded. Ensembl_version: Ensembl database version. Datasets: Datasets available selected BioMart database. Attributes: Attributes available selected BioMart database. geneID_unmapped: character vector gene IDs unmapped database.

title: The Group Heatmap — GroupHeatmap
text: srt Seurat object. features character vector features use. Default NULL. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. within_groups Whether create separate heatmap scales group within group. Default FALSE. grouping.var character vector specifies another variable grouping, certain conditions. Default NULL. numerator character vector specifying value use numerator grouping.var grouping. Default NULL. cells character vector cell names use. Default NULL. aggregate_fun function use aggregating data within groups. Default base::mean. exp_cutoff threshold cell counting add_dot TRUE. Default 0. border Whether add border heatmap. Default TRUE. flip Whether flip heatmap. Default FALSE. layer layer use. Default "counts". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. exp_method character vector specifying method calculating expression values. Options "zscore", "raw", "fc", "log2fc", "log1p". Default "zscore". exp_legend_title character vector specifying title legend expression value. Default NULL. limits two-length numeric vector specifying limits color scale. Default NULL. lib_normalize Whether normalize data library size. libsize numeric vector specifying library size cell. Default NULL. feature_split factor specifying split features. Default NULL. feature_split_by character vector specifying group.use splitting features (n_split feature clusters). Default NULL. n_split number feature splits (feature clusters) create. Default NULL. split_order numeric vector specifying order splits. Default NULL. split_method character vector specifying method splitting features. Options "kmeans", "hclust", "mfuzz". Default "kmeans". decreasing Whether sort feature splits decreasing order. Default FALSE. fuzzification fuzzification coefficient. Default NULL. cluster_features_by character vector specifying group.use clustering features. Default NULL. default, parameter set NULL, means groups used. cluster_rows Whether cluster rows heatmap. Default FALSE. cluster_columns Whether cluster columns heatmap. Default FALSE. cluster_row_slices Whether cluster row slices heatmap. Default FALSE. cluster_column_slices Whether cluster column slices heatmap. Default FALSE. show_row_names Whether show row names heatmap. Default FALSE. show_column_names Whether show column names heatmap. Default FALSE. row_names_side character vector specifying side place row names. column_names_side character vector specifying side place column names. row_names_rot rotation angle row names. Default 0. column_names_rot rotation angle column names. Default 90. row_title character vector specifying title rows. Default NULL. column_title character vector specifying title columns. Default NULL. row_title_side character vector specifying side place row title. Default "left". column_title_side character vector specifying side place column title. Default "top". row_title_rot rotation angle row title. Default 0. column_title_rot rotation angle column title. anno_terms Whether include term annotations. Default FALSE. anno_keys Whether include key annotations. Default FALSE. anno_features Whether include feature annotations. Default FALSE. terms_width unit specifying width term annotations. Default unit(4, ""). terms_fontsize numeric vector specifying font size(s) term annotations. Default 8. keys_width unit specifying width key annotations. Default unit(2, ""). keys_fontsize two-length numeric vector specifying minimum maximum font size(s) key annotations. Default c(6, 10). features_width unit specifying width feature annotations. Default unit(2, ""). features_fontsize two-length numeric vector specifying minimum maximum font size(s) feature annotations. Default c(6, 10). IDtype character vector specifying type IDs features. Default "symbol". species character vector specifying species features. Default "Homo_sapiens". db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether use combined database. Default FALSE. convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror character vector specifying mirror Ensembl database. Default NULL. db character vector specifying database use. Default "GO_BP". TERM2GENE data.frame specifying TERM2GENE mapping database. Default NULL. TERM2NAME data.frame specifying TERM2NAME mapping database. Default NULL. minGSSize integer specifying minimum gene set size database. Default 10. maxGSSize integer specifying maximum gene set size database. Default 500. GO_simplify Whether simplify gene ontology terms. Default FALSE. GO_simplify_cutoff character vector specifying cutoff GO simplification. Default "p.adjust < 0.05". simplify_method character vector specifying method GO simplification. Default "Wang". simplify_similarityCutoff similarity cutoff GO simplification. Default 0.7. pvalueCutoff numeric vector specifying p-value cutoff(s) significance. Default NULL. padjustCutoff adjusted p-value cutoff significance. Default 0.05. topTerm number top terms include. Default 5. show_termid Whether show term IDs. Default FALSE. topWord number top words include. Default 20. words_excluded character vector specifying words exclude. Default NULL. nlabel number labels include. Default 20. features_label character vector specifying features label. Default NULL. label_size size labels. Default 10. label_color character vector specifying color labels. Default "black". add_bg Whether add background heatmap. Default FALSE. bg_alpha alpha value background color. Default 0.5. add_dot Whether add dots heatmap. size dot represents percentage expressed cells based specified exp_cutoff. Default FALSE. dot_size unit specifying base size dots. Default unit(8, "mm"). add_reticle Whether add reticles heatmap. Default FALSE. reticle_color character vector specifying color reticles. Default "grey". add_violin Whether add violins heatmap. Default FALSE. fill.character vector specifying fill violin. Possible values "group", "feature", "expression". Default "feature". fill_palette character vector specifying palette use fill. Default "Dark2". fill_palcolor character vector specifying fill color use. Default NULL. heatmap_palette character vector specifying palette use heatmap. Default "RdBu". heatmap_palcolor character vector specifying heatmap color use. Default NULL. group_palette character vector specifying palette use groups. Default "Chinese". group_palcolor character vector specifying group color use. Default NULL. cell_split_palette character vector specifying palette use cell splits. Default "simspec". cell_split_palcolor character vector specifying cell split color use. Default NULL. feature_split_palette character vector specifying palette use feature splits. Default "simspec". feature_split_palcolor character vector specifying feature split color use. Default NULL. cell_annotation character vector specifying cell annotation(s) include. Default NULL. cell_annotation_palette character vector specifying palette use cell annotations. length vector match number cell_annotation. Default "Chinese". cell_annotation_palcolor list character vector specifying cell annotation color(s) use. length list match number cell_annotation. Default NULL. cell_annotation_params list specifying additional parameters cell annotations. Default list width = unit(1, "cm") flip TRUE, else list height = unit(1, "cm"). feature_annotation character vector specifying feature annotation(s) include. Default NULL. feature_annotation_palette character vector specifying palette use feature annotations. length vector match number feature_annotation. Default "Dark2". feature_annotation_palcolor list character vector specifying feature annotation color use. length list match number feature_annotation. Default NULL. feature_annotation_params list specifying additional parameters feature annotations. Default list(). use_raster Whether use raster device plotting. Default NULL. raster_device character vector specifying raster device use. Default "png". raster_by_magick Whether use 'magick' package raster. Default FALSE. height height heatmap specified units. provided, height automatically determined based number rows heatmap default unit. width width heatmap specified units. provided, width automatically determined based number columns heatmap default unit. units units use width height heatmap. Default "inch", Options "mm", "cm", "inch". cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. ht_params Additional parameters customize appearance heatmap. list named elements, names correspond parameter names ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap function. conflicting parameters override defaults set function. Default list(). verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap function.

title: Seurat v5 Harmony integration — Harmony5_integrate
code: Harmony5_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   harmony_dims_use = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   IntegrateLayers_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Seurat v5 Harmony integration — Harmony5_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. harmony_dims_use vector specifying integrated dimensions used downstream clustering nonlinear reduction. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. IntegrateLayers_params list parameters passed [Seurat::IntegrateLayers]. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: The Harmony integration function — Harmony_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". scale_within_batch Whether scale data within batch. valid integration_method one "Uncorrected", "Seurat", "MNN", "Harmony", "BBKNN", "CSS", "ComBat". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. harmony_dims_use vector specifying dimensions returned RunHarmony utilized downstream cell cluster finding nonlinear reduction. set NULL, returned dimensions used default. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. RunHarmony_params list parameters [harmony::RunHarmony], default empty list. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Plot LISI scores — LISIPlot
text: Backward-compatible wrapper around BenchmarkPlot() LISI scores. Visualize LISI scores dimensional reduction compare methods summary boxplot.

title: Plot LISI scores — LISIPlot
code: LISIPlot(   srt,   features = NULL,   tool_name = NULL,   reduction = NULL,   plot_boxplot = TRUE,   boxplot_jitter = FALSE,   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE,   pt.size = NULL,   pt.alpha = 1,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Plot LISI scores — LISIPlot
text: srt Seurat object. features Metadata columns containing LISI scores. Default NULL, use columns stored tool_name, metadata columns ending "_LISI" tool_name NULL. tool_name Tool entry created RunLISI(). Default NULL. reduction Dimensional reduction used feature plots. NULL, reduction recorded tool_name used available; otherwise DefaultReduction() used. plot_boxplot Whether add boxplots. Default TRUE. boxplot_jitter Whether overlay jittered points boxplots. Default FALSE. combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. pt.size size points plot. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... message print.

title: Plot LISI scores — LISIPlot
text: combine = TRUE, returns combined patchwork plot. combine = FALSE, returns named list ggplot objects.

title: Lineage Plot — LineagePlot
code: LineagePlot(   srt,   lineages,   reduction = NULL,   dims = c(1, 2),   cells = NULL,   trim = c(0.01, 0.99),   span = 0.75,   palette = "Dark2",   palcolor = NULL,   lineages_arrow = grid::arrow(length = grid::unit(0.1, "inches")),   linewidth = 1,   line_bg = "white",   line_bg_stroke = 0.5,   whiskers = FALSE,   whiskers_linewidth = 0.5,   whiskers_alpha = 0.5,   aspect.ratio = 1,   title = NULL,   subtitle = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   return_layer = FALSE,   seed = 11 )

title: Lineage Plot — LineagePlot
text: srt Seurat object. lineages character vector specifies lineages included. Typically, use pseudotime cells. reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. dims Dimensions plot, must two-length numeric vector specifying x- y-dimensions cells character vector cell names use. trim numeric vector length 2 specifying quantile range lineages include plot. span span loess smoother. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Dark2". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. lineages_arrow arrow object specifying arrow lineages. linewidth linewidth lineages. line_bg character string specifying color background lines. line_bg_stroke stroke width background lines. whiskers Whether include whiskers plot. whiskers_linewidth linewidth whiskers. whiskers_alpha transparency whiskers. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Default NULL. subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). return_layer Whether return plot layers list. Defaults FALSE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: The MultiMAP integration function — MultiMAP_integrate
text: MultiMAP integration function

title: The MultiMAP integration function — MultiMAP_integrate
code: MultiMAP_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   scale_within_batch = FALSE,   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   gene_activity_assay = "ACTIVITY",   MultiMAP_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: The MultiMAP integration function — MultiMAP_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". scale_within_batch Whether scale data within batch. valid integration_method one "Uncorrected", "Seurat", "MNN", "Harmony", "BBKNN", "CSS", "ComBat". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. gene_activity_assay Name gene activity assay used provide shared feature space RNA-ATAC integration. Default `"ACTIVITY"`. MultiMAP_params list parameters passed `MultiMAP::Integration`. following keys managed internally supplied: `"adatas"`, `"use_reps"`, `"embedding"`, `"seed"`. Default `list()`. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: The MultiMAP integration function — MultiMAP_integrate
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data("pbmcmultiome_sub", package = "scop") pbmcmultiome_sub$batch <- rep(c("batch1", "batch2"), length.out = ncol(pbmcmultiome_sub)) pbmcmultiome_sub <- MultiMAP_integrate(   srt_merge = pbmcmultiome_sub,   batch = "batch",   linear_reduction_dims = 20,   linear_reduction_dims_use = 1:10 ) } # }

title: PAGA plot — PAGAPlot
text: function generates PAGA plot based given Seurat object PAGA result.

title: PAGA plot — PAGAPlot
code: PAGAPlot(   srt,   paga = srt@misc$paga,   type = "connectivities",   reduction = NULL,   dims = c(1, 2),   cells = NULL,   show_transition = FALSE,   node_palette = "Chinese",   node_palcolor = NULL,   node_size = 4,   node_alpha = 1,   node_highlight = NULL,   node_highlight_color = "red",   label = FALSE,   label.size = 3.5,   label.fg = "white",   label.bg = "black",   label.bg.r = 0.1,   label_insitu = FALSE,   label_repel = FALSE,   label_repulsion = 20,   label_point_size = 1,   label_point_color = "black",   label_segment_color = "black",   edge_threshold = 0.01,   edge_line = c("straight", "curved"),   edge_line_curvature = 0.3,   edge_line_angle = 90,   edge_size = c(0.2, 1),   edge_color = "grey40",   edge_alpha = 0.5,   edge_shorten = 0,   edge_offset = 0,   edge_highlight = NULL,   edge_highlight_color = "red",   transition_threshold = 0.01,   transition_line = c("straight", "curved"),   transition_line_curvature = 0.3,   transition_line_angle = 90,   transition_size = c(0.2, 1),   transition_color = "black",   transition_alpha = 1,   transition_arrow_type = "closed",   transition_arrow_angle = 20,   transition_arrow_length = grid::unit(0.02, "npc"),   transition_shorten = 0.05,   transition_offset = 0,   transition_highlight = NULL,   transition_highlight_color = "red",   aspect.ratio = 1,   title = "PAGA",   subtitle = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   return_layer = FALSE )

title: PAGA plot — PAGAPlot
text: srt Seurat object. paga PAGA result Seurat object. Default srt@misc$paga. type type plot generate. Possible values "connectivities" (default) "connectivities_tree". reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. dims Dimensions plot, must two-length numeric vector specifying x- y-dimensions cells character vector cell names use. show_transition Whether display transitions different cell states. Default FALSE. node_palette character vector specifying name color palette node groups. node_palcolor character vector specifying names colors node group. node_size numeric value column name node specifying size nodes. node_alpha numeric value column name node specifying transparency nodes. node_highlight character vector specifying names nodes highlight. node_highlight_color character vector specifying color highlighting nodes. label Whether label cell groups. label.size Size labels. label.fg Foreground color label. label.bg Background color label. label.bg.r Background ratio label. label_insitu Whether place raw labels (group names) center cells corresponding group. Default FALSE, using numbers instead raw labels. label_repel Logical value indicating whether label repel away center points. label_repulsion Force repulsion overlapping text labels. Default 20. label_point_size Size center points. label_point_color Color center points. label_segment_color Color line segment labels. edge_threshold threshold removing edges. edge_line character vector specifying type line edges (straight, curved). edge_line_curvature curvature curved edges. edge_line_angle angle curved edges. edge_size Size edges. edge_color Color edges. edge_alpha Transparency edges. edge_shorten length edge shorten. edge_offset length edge offset. edge_highlight character vector specifying names edges highlight. edge_highlight_color character vector specifying color highlighting edges. transition_threshold threshold removing transitions. transition_line character vector specifying type line transitions (straight, curved). transition_line_curvature curvature curved transitions. transition_line_angle angle curved transitions. transition_size numeric vector specifying range transition sizes. transition_color character vector specifying color transitions. transition_alpha transparency transitions. transition_arrow_type character vector specifying type arrow transitions (closed, open). transition_arrow_angle angle transition arrow. transition_arrow_length length transition arrow. transition_shorten length transition shorten. transition_offset length transition offset. transition_highlight character vector specifying names transitions highlight. transition_highlight_color character vector specifying color highlighting transitions. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Default "PAGA". subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). return_layer Whether return plot layers list. Defaults FALSE.

what: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
text: function prepares gene annotation databases given species set annotation sources. retrieves necessary information various annotation packages external resources organizes list. list contains annotation data specified annotation source.

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
code: PrepareDB(   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   db = c("GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM",     "MP", "DO", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink",     "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat",     "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2"),   db_IDtypes = c("symbol", "entrez_id", "ensembl_id"),   db_version = "latest",   db_update = FALSE,   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   biomart = NULL,   max_tries = 5,   custom_TERM2GENE = NULL,   custom_TERM2NAME = NULL,   custom_species = NULL,   custom_IDtype = NULL,   custom_version = NULL,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
text: species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2". Note: "CytoTRACE2" species-independent downloads pre-trained model data required RunCytoTRACE. db_IDtypes character vector specifying desired ID types used gene identifiers gene annotation databases. Default c("symbol", "entrez_id", "ensembl_id"). db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". biomart name BioMart database want connect . Possible options include "ensembl", "protists_mart", "fungi_mart", "plants_mart". max_tries maximum number attempts connect BioMart service. custom_TERM2GENE data frame containing custom TERM2GENE mapping specified species annotation source. Default NULL. custom_TERM2NAME data frame containing custom TERM2NAME mapping specified species annotation source. Default NULL. custom_species character vector specifying species name used custom database. Default NULL. custom_IDtype character vector specifying ID type used custom database. Default NULL. custom_version character vector specifying version used custom database. Default NULL. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
text: list containing prepared gene annotation databases: TERM2GENE: mapping gene identifiers terms. TERM2NAME: mapping terms names. semData: semantic similarity data gene sets (Gene Ontology terms).

title: Prepare the python environment — PrepareEnv
text: Prepare python environment installing required dependencies setting environment.

title: Prepare the python environment — PrepareEnv
code: PrepareEnv(   envname = NULL,   conda = "auto",   miniconda_repo = "https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda",   version = if (is_windows()) "3.11-1" else "3.10-1",   force = FALSE,   modules = NULL,   pip_options = character(),   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Prepare the python environment — PrepareEnv
text: envname name conda-compatible Python environment. NULL, environment name set "scop_env". Default NULL. conda path command name conda-compatible executable (conda, mamba, micromamba). Use "auto" allow automatically finding appropriate environment manager. "micromamba" requested micromamba available PATH, package-managed micromamba downloaded automatically. miniconda_repo Repository URL miniconda. Default https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda. version Python version. Default "3.10-1" macOS Unix "3.11-1" Windows. force Whether force recreation environment. TRUE, existing environment removed recreated. Default FALSE. modules Optional Python dependency modules install addition default scientific stack. Supported values "scanpy", "scvi", "glue", "scanorama", "bbknn", "celltypist", "cellphonedb", "magic", "scrublet", "sccoda", "doubletdetection", "doublet", "palantir", "scvelo", "cellrank", "wot", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "multimap", "scomm", "scenic". NULL omitted PrepareEnv(), default environment installed. default excludes "sccoda" "scomm" TensorFlow stacks compatible default JAX/scVI stack environment; request explicitly scCODA/scOMM workflows. "scenic" also excluded default environment prepared "scenic_env" default SCENIC requires older Python/numpy stack. Windows, default also excludes "scvi", "glue", "multimap" upstream stacks reliable requested explicitly method-specific workflows. pip_options Additional command line arguments passed uv/pip installing pip packages. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed package installation functions.

what: Prepare Seurat objects for the SCExplorer — PrepareSCExplorer
title: Prepare Seurat objects for the SCExplorer — PrepareSCExplorer
text: function prepares one multiple Seurat objects SCExplorer app. takes Seurat object list Seurat objects input outputs two hdf5 files: one data one metadata.

title: Prepare Seurat objects for the SCExplorer — PrepareSCExplorer
code: PrepareSCExplorer(   object,   base_dir = "SCExplorer",   data_file = "data.hdf5",   meta_file = "meta.hdf5",   assays = "RNA",   layers = c("counts", "data"),   ignore_nlevel = 100,   write_tools = FALSE,   write_misc = FALSE,   compression_level = 6,   overwrite = FALSE )

title: Prepare Seurat objects for the SCExplorer — PrepareSCExplorer
text: object Seurat object list Seurat objects. base_dir base directory SCExplorer hdf5 files written. Default "SCExplorer". data_file Path output data file. provided, file named "data.hdf5" current directory. meta_file Path output meta file. provided, file named "meta.hdf5" current directory. assays assays include data file. Default "RNA". layers layers include data file. Default "data". ignore_nlevel number levels metadata field ignored. Default 100. write_tools Whether write tools information meta file. Default FALSE. write_misc Whether write miscellaneous information meta file. Default FALSE. compression_level Compression level HDF5 dataset. Default 6. overwrite Whether overwrite existing data data file. Default TRUE.

title: Projection Plot — ProjectionPlot
text: function generates projection plot, can used compare two groups cells dimensionality reduction space.

title: Projection Plot — ProjectionPlot
code: ProjectionPlot(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_group = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   query_reduction = "ref.embeddings",   ref_reduction = srt_query[[query_reduction]]@misc[["reduction.model"]] %||% NULL,   query_param = list(palette = "Set1", cells.highlight = TRUE),   ref_param = list(palette = "Chinese"),   xlim = NULL,   ylim = NULL,   pt.size = 0.8,   stroke.highlight = 0.5 )

title: Projection Plot — ProjectionPlot
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_group grouping variable query group cells. ref_group grouping variable reference group cells. query_reduction name reduction query group cells. ref_reduction name reduction reference group cells. query_param list parameters customizing query group plot. Available parameters: palette (color palette groups) cells.highlight (whether highlight cells). ref_param list parameters customizing reference group plot. Available parameters: palette (color palette groups) cells.highlight (whether highlight cells). xlim x-axis limits plot. provided, limits calculated based data. ylim y-axis limits plot. provided, limits calculated based data. pt.size size points plot. stroke.highlight size stroke highlight cells.

title: Proportion Test Plot — ProportionTestPlot
text: Generate differential-abundance plots based results RunProportionTest. Supports legacy storage method-layer storage multi-method proportion-test workflow.

title: Proportion Test Plot — ProportionTestPlot
code: ProportionTestPlot(   srt,   comparison = NULL,   proportion_method = NULL,   result_level = c("group"),   plot_type = c("effect", "umap"),   umap_mode = c("discrete", "continuous"),   reduction = "UMAP",   projection_args = list(),   FDR_threshold = 0.05,   log2FD_threshold = log2(1.5),   order_by = c("value", "name"),   palette = "RdBu",   palcolor = NULL,   group_palette = "Chinese",   group_palcolor = NULL,   pt.size = 1,   pt.alpha = 1,   cols.sig = "red",   cols.ns = "grey",   cols.increase = "#d7301f",   cols.decrease = "#2b8cbe",   effect_color_mode = c("directional", "classic"),   nlabel = 5,   features_label = NULL,   label = FALSE,   label.fg = "black",   label.bg = "white",   label.bg.r = 0.1,   label.size = 4,   aspect.ratio = NULL,   xlab = "Cell Type",   ylab = "log2 (FD)",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   legend.position = "bottom",   legend.direction = "vertical",   legend.title = "Significance",   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Proportion Test Plot — ProportionTestPlot
text: srt Seurat object containing proportion-test results. comparison character string specifying comparison plot. NULL, plots comparisons. proportion_method Optional method select srt@tools[['ProportionTest']][['methods']]. NULL, uses active/recent method. result_level Result level draw. Currently "group" used. plot_type Plot type. One "effect" "umap". umap_mode UMAP projection mode plot_type = "umap". "discrete" maps cells DA direction categories; "continuous" maps cells group-level obs_log2FD. reduction Reduction name used UMAP projection. projection_args Additional arguments passed CellDimPlot (umap_mode = "discrete") FeatureDimPlot (umap_mode = "continuous"). FDR_threshold FDR value cutoff significance. log2FD_threshold Absolute value log2FD cutoff significance. order_by Method order clusters. Options: "name" (alphabetical), "value" (log2FD value). palette Color palette name continuous effect coloring. palcolor Custom colors palette. group_palette Palette cluster/group coloring. group_palcolor Custom colors group_palette. pt.size size points. pt.alpha Point transparency. cols.sig Color significant/credible points intervals. cols.ns Color non-significant points intervals. cols.increase Default color increased DA groups. cols.decrease Default color decreased DA groups. effect_color_mode Coloring mode plot_type = "effect". Use "directional" (default) increased/decreased/NS colors, "classic" legacy significant/non-significant coloring. nlabel Number labels added label = TRUE features_label = NULL. features_label Character vector specifying points label. label Whether add labels. label.fg Label foreground color. label.bg Label background color. label.bg.r Label background radius. label.size Label text size. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. xlab character string specifying x-axis label. plot_type = "umap", forwarded projection plot set. ylab character string specifying y-axis label. plot_type = "umap", forwarded projection plot set. theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". legend.title Title legend. combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Pseudotime Projection Plot — PseudotimeProjectionPlot
text: function creates projection plot similar VelocityPlot, uses pseudotime data instead RNA velocity analysis results.

title: Pseudotime Projection Plot — PseudotimeProjectionPlot
code: PseudotimeProjectionPlot(   srt,   reduction,   time_key,   dims = c(1, 2),   cells = NULL,   method = c("knn", "gradient"),   k = 30,   graph_name = NULL,   plot_type = c("raw", "grid", "stream"),   group.by = NULL,   group_palette = "Chinese",   group_palcolor = NULL,   n_neighbors = ceiling(ncol(srt@assays[[1]])/50),   density = 2,   smooth = 0.5,   scale = 1,   min_mass = 1,   cutoff_perc = 5,   arrow_angle = 20,   arrow_color = "black",   streamline_L = 5,   streamline_minL = 1,   streamline_res = 1,   streamline_n = 15,   streamline_width = c(0, 0.8),   streamline_alpha = 1,   streamline_color = NULL,   streamline_palette = "RdYlBu",   streamline_palcolor = NULL,   streamline_bg_color = "white",   streamline_bg_stroke = 0.5,   aspect.ratio = 1,   title = "Pseudotime projection",   subtitle = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   return_layer = FALSE,   palette = NULL,   palcolor = NULL,   show_cells = TRUE,   pt.size = 2,   pt.alpha = 0.3,   label = NULL,   label.size = 4,   label.fg = "black",   label.bg = "white",   label.bg.r = 0.1,   seed = 11 )

title: Pseudotime Projection Plot — PseudotimeProjectionPlot
text: srt Seurat object. reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. time_key Name column Seurat object metadata containing pseudotime values. dims Dimensions plot, must two-length numeric vector specifying x- y-dimensions cells character vector cell names use. method Method compute velocity vectors pseudotime. Can "gradient" "knn". Default "knn". k Number nearest neighbors use method = "knn". Default 30. graph_name Name KNN graph Seurat object use. NULL, new graph computed. Default NULL. plot_type Type plot create. Can "raw", "grid", "stream". group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . group_palette Name palette use coloring groups. Defaults "Chinese". group_palcolor Colors use coloring groups. Defaults NULL. n_neighbors Number neighbors include density estimation. Defaults ceiling(ncol(srt@assays[[1]]) / 50). density Scale streamline grid (number points per axis ceiling(50 * density)). Default 2 (CellRank/scvelo-style). smooth Smoothing parameter density estimation. Defaults 0.5. scale Scaling factor velocity vectors. Defaults 1. min_mass Minimum mass value density-based cutoff. Defaults 1. cutoff_perc Percentile value density-based cutoff. Defaults 5. arrow_angle Angle arrowheads. Defaults 20. arrow_color Color arrowheads. Defaults "black". streamline_L Typical length streamline x y units streamline_minL Minimum length segments show. streamline_res Resolution parameter (higher numbers increases resolution). streamline_n Number points draw. streamline_width Size streamline. streamline_alpha Transparency streamline. streamline_color Color streamline. streamline_palette Color palette used streamline. streamline_palcolor Custom colors used streamline. streamline_bg_color Background color streamline. streamline_bg_stroke Border width streamline background. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Defaults "Pseudotime projection". subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). return_layer Whether return plot layers list. Defaults FALSE. palette Deprecated alias group_palette. palcolor Deprecated alias group_palcolor. show_cells Whether show cell points plot. Defaults TRUE. pt.size Size cell points. Defaults 2 (CellRank-style overlapping patches). pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 0.3 (CellRank/scvelo-style). label Whether label cell groups. Defaults TRUE group.specified. label.size Size labels. label.fg Foreground color labels. Defaults "black". label.bg Background color labels. Defaults "white". label.bg.r Background ratio label. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Seurat v5 RPCA integration — RPCA_integrate
code: RPCA_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   IntegrateLayers_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Seurat v5 RPCA integration — RPCA_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. IntegrateLayers_params list parameters passed [Seurat::IntegrateLayers]. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Attempt to recover raw counts from the normalized matrix — RecoverCounts
text: srt Seurat object. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. trans transformation function applied data presumed log-normalized. min_count Minimum UMI count genes. tolerance recovering raw counts, nCount cell theoretically calculated integer. However, due decimal point preservation normalization, calculated nCount usually floating point number close integer. tolerance difference integer. Default 0.1 sf Set scaling factor manually. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Attempt to recover raw counts from the normalized matrix — RecoverCounts
code: data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:48] Start standard processing workflow... #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:49] Checking a list of <Seurat>... #> ! [2026-05-25 10:22:49] Data 1/1 of the `srt_list` is "unknown" #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:49] Perform `NormalizeData()` with `normalization.method = 'LogNormalize'` on 1/1 of `srt_list`... #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:51] Perform `Seurat::FindVariableFeatures()` on 1/1 of `srt_list`... #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:51] Use the separate HVF from `srt_list` #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:51] Number of available HVF: 2000 #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:51] Finished check #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:51] Perform `Seurat::ScaleData()` #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:52] Perform pca linear dimension reduction #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:52] Use stored estimated dimensions 1:23 for Standardpca #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:53] Perform `Seurat::FindClusters()` with `cluster_algorithm = 'louvain'` and `cluster_resolution = 0.6` #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:53] Reorder clusters... #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:53] Skip `log1p()` because `layer = data` is not "counts" #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:53] Perform umap nonlinear dimension reduction #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:53] Perform umap nonlinear dimension reduction using Standardpca (1:23) #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:22:57] Perform umap nonlinear dimension reduction using Standardpca (1:23) #> ✔ [2026-05-25 10:23:02] Standard processing workflow completed raw_counts <- GetAssayData5(   pancreas_sub,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "counts" )  # Normalized the data pancreas_sub <- Seurat::NormalizeData(pancreas_sub) #> Normalizing layer: counts  # Now replace counts with the log-normalized data matrix data <- GetAssayData5(   pancreas_sub,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "data" ) new_pancreas_sub <- SeuratObject::SetAssayData(   object = pancreas_sub,   layer = "counts",   new.data = data,   assay = "RNA" ) # Recover the counts and compare with the raw counts matrix pancreas_sub <- RecoverCounts(new_pancreas_sub) #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:23:04] Data type is log-normalized #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:23:04] The data is presumed to be log-normalized #> ℹ [2026-05-25 10:23:04] Perform "expm1" on the raw data new_counts <- GetAssayData5(   pancreas_sub,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "counts" ) identical(raw_counts, new_counts) #> [1] TRUE

NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. platform Spatial sequencing platform. image Name Seurat spatial image used recover spot coordinates already present metadata. regular Visium data pixel x/y coordinates, BayesSpace array coordinates inferred spatial grid. use_reduction Optional Seurat reduction pass BayesSpace PCA. dims Dimensions use_reduction use. preprocess Whether run BayesSpace::spatialPreprocess(). n.PCs, n.HVGs Parameters passed spatialPreprocess(). skip.PCA Whether skip PCA inside spatialPreprocess(). spatial_preprocess_params Additional parameters passed BayesSpace::spatialPreprocess(). spatial_cluster_params Additional parameters passed BayesSpace::spatialCluster(). cluster_colname Metadata column used BayesSpace clusters. init_colname Metadata column used BayesSpace initial clusters. store_sce Whether store BayesSpace SingleCellExperiment srt@tools. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

what: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
text: Single-cell reference mapping CSS method

title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
code: RunCSSMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = srt_ref[[ref_css]]@assay.used,   ref_css = NULL,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean" )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_css name CSS reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

title: Run CellChat analysis — RunCellChat
code: RunCellChat(   srt,   group.by,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus", "zebrafish"),   split.by = NULL,   annotation_selected = NULL,   group_column = NULL,   group_cmp = NULL,   thresh = 0.05,   min.cells = 10,   do.fast = FALSE,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellChat analysis — RunCellChat
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . species species data, either "Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus", "zebrafish". split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. annotation_selected vector cell annotations interest running CellChat analysis. provided, cell types considered. group_column Name metadata column Seurat object defines conditions groups. group_cmp list pairwise condition comparisons differential CellChat analysis. thresh threshold computing centrality scores. Default 0.05. min.cells minmum number expressed cells required genes considered cell-cell communication analysis. Default 10. .fast Whether use CellChat's fast Wilcoxon implementation backed presto. Set TRUE presto installed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. layer layer use expression data. Default "data". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
text: Estimate cell cycle state Seurat gene-set scoring, scran::cyclone(), tricycle.

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
code: RunCellCycle(   srt,   method = c("Seurat", "cyclone", "tricycle"),   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   name = "CellCycle",   phase_col = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
text: srt Seurat object. method Cell cycle estimation method. One "Seurat", "cyclone", "tricycle". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer Data layer used cyclone tricycle. Default "counts". species Latin names animals, .e., "Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus" name Prefix metadata columns tricycle reduction names. Default "CellCycle". phase_col Optional metadata column used store final phase call, example "Phase". Default NULL, avoids writing compatibility phase column. overwrite Whether overwrite existing output columns. Default FALSE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed selected method.

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
text: Seurat object cell cycle metadata , tricycle, tricycle embedding reduction.

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
text: Run cell-level quality control

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
code: RunCellQC(   srt,   assay = "RNA",   split.by = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   return_filtered = FALSE,   qc_metrics = c("doublets", "decontX", "atac", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo",     "ribo_mito_ratio", "species"),   db_method = "scDblFinder",   db_rate = NULL,   db_coefficient = 0.01,   decontX_threshold = NULL,   decontX_batch = NULL,   decontX_background = NULL,   decontX_background_assay = NULL,   decontX_bg_batch = NULL,   decontX_assay_name = "decontXcounts",   decontX_store_assay = FALSE,   decontX_round_counts = TRUE,   decontX_args = list(),   atac_args = list(),   outlier_threshold = c("log10_nCount:lower:2.5", "log10_nCount:higher:5",     "log10_nFeature:lower:2.5", "log10_nFeature:higher:5", "featurecount_dist:lower:2.5"),   outlier_n = 1,   UMI_threshold = 3000,   gene_threshold = 1000,   mito_threshold = 20,   mito_pattern = c("MT-", "Mt-", "mt-"),   mito_gene = NULL,   ribo_threshold = 50,   ribo_pattern = c("RP[SL]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "Rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$",     "rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$"),   ribo_gene = NULL,   ribo_mito_ratio_range = c(1, Inf),   species = NULL,   species_gene_prefix = NULL,   species_percent = 95,   seed = 11 )

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
text: srt Seurat object. assay name assay used doublet-calling. Default "RNA". split.Name meta.data column used split object QC. Default NULL. specified, QC doublet-calling performed separately within split object merged back afterward. group.Group labels passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Can NULL, meta.data column name, vector aligned cells. Default NULL. return_filtered Logical indicating whether return cell-filtered Seurat object. Default FALSE. qc_metrics character vector specifying quality control metrics applied. Available metrics "doublets", "decontX", "atac", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo", "ribo_mito_ratio", "species". Default c("doublets", "decontX", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo", "ribo_mito_ratio", "species"). ChromatinAssay, .arg qc_metrics supplied, default "atac". db_method Method used doublet-calling. Can one "scDblFinder", "Scrublet", "DoubletDetection", "scds_cxds", "scds_bcds", "scds_hybrid". resulting doublet labels aggregated afterward db_qc affect thresholds used QC metrics. db_rate expected doublet rate. Default calculated ncol(srt) / 1000 * 0.01. db_coefficient coefficient used calculate doublet rate. Default 0.01. Doublet rate calculated ncol(srt) / 1000 * db_coefficient. decontX_threshold Optional contamination threshold used filter cells running RunDecontX(). Cells decontX_contamination greater value marked failed decontX_qc. Default NULL, computes decontX results without filtering cells contamination. decontX_batch Batch labels passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Default NULL. decontX_background Optional background / empty-droplet input passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Default NULL. decontX_background_assay Assay name used decontX_background Seurat object SingleCellExperiment. Default NULL. decontX_bg_batch Batch labels decontX_background passed RunDecontX(). Default NULL. decontX_assay_name Name assay used store decontaminated counts RunDecontX(). Default "decontXcounts". decontX_store_assay Whether store decontaminated counts new assay running RunDecontX(). Default FALSE. decontX_round_counts Whether round decontaminated counts creating assay RunDecontX(). Default TRUE. decontX_args named list additional advanced arguments passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Explicit decontX_* parameters preferred common options take precedence supplied. Default list(). atac_args named list additional arguments passed RunATACQC() "atac" included qc_metrics. Threshold arguments RunATACQC() used label failed cells atac_qc, filtering deferred RunCellQC(). Default list(). outlier_threshold character vector specifying outlier threshold. Default c("log10_nCount:lower:2.5", "log10_nCount:higher:5", "log10_nFeature:lower:2.5", "log10_nFeature:higher:5", "featurecount_dist:lower:2.5"). outlier_n Minimum number outlier metrics meet conditions determining outlier cells. Default 1. UMI_threshold UMI number threshold. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 3000. gene_threshold Gene number threshold. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 1000. mito_threshold Percentage UMI counts mitochondrial genes. Cells exceed threshold considered discarded. Default 20. mito_pattern Regex patterns match mitochondrial genes. Default c("MT-", "Mt-", "mt-"). mito_gene defined mitochondrial genes. features provided, ignore mito_pattern matching. Default NULL. ribo_threshold Percentage UMI counts ribosomal genes. Cells exceed threshold considered discarded. Default 50. ribo_pattern Regex patterns match ribosomal genes. Default c("RP[SL]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "Rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$"). ribo_gene defined ribosomal genes. features provided, ignore ribo_pattern matching. Default NULL. ribo_mito_ratio_range numeric vector specifying range ribosomal/mitochondrial gene expression ratios ribo_mito_ratio outlier cells. Default c(1, Inf). species Species used suffix QC metrics. first species interest. Default NULL. species_gene_prefix Species gene prefix used calculate QC metrics species. Default NULL. species_percent Percentage UMI counts first species. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 95. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
text: Returns Seurat object QC results stored meta.data layer.
