title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
text: CellRank toolkit studying cellular dynamics using Markov state modeling.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
code: RunCellRank(   srt = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   adata = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   cores = 1,   linear_reduction = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = NULL,   basis = NULL,   mode = "stochastic",   fitting_by = "stochastic",   magic_impute = FALSE,   knn = 5,   t = 2,   min_shared_counts = 30,   n_pcs = 30,   n_neighbors = 30,   stream_smooth = NULL,   stream_density = 2,   arrow_size = 5,   arrow_length = 5,   arrow_density = 0.5,   calculate_velocity_genes = FALSE,   denoise = FALSE,   kinetics = FALSE,   kernel_type = c("velocity", "pseudotime", "cytotrace", "wot"),   time_key = "dpt_pseudotime",   time_field = "Time",   growth_iters = 3L,   tmap_out = "tmaps/tmap_out",   recalculate = FALSE,   estimator_type = c("GPCCA", "CFLARE"),   use_connectivity_kernel = TRUE,   velocity_weight = 0.8,   connectivity_weight = 0.2,   softmax_scale = 4,   n_macrostates = NULL,   schur_method = c("krylov", "brandts"),   n_cells_terminal = 10,   show_plot = TRUE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "cellrank",   legend.position = "on data",   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   dirpath = "./cellrank",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". adata anndata object. Default NULL. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . cores number cores use cellrank. linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". basis basis use reduction, e.g., "UMAP". mode Velocity estimation models use. Can "deterministic", "stochastic", "dynamical". fitting_by Method used fit gene velocities dynamical modeling. Default "stochastic". magic_impute Flag indicating whether perform magic imputation. Default FALSE. knn number nearest neighbors magic.MAGIC. Default 5. t Power diffusion operator powered magic.MAGIC. Default 2. min_shared_counts Minimum number counts (unspliced spliced) required gene. Default 30. n_pcs Number principal components use linear reduction. Default 30. n_neighbors Number neighbors use constructing KNN graph. Default 30. stream_smooth Multiplication factor scale Gaussian kernel around grid point. stream_density Controls closeness streamlines. density = 2 (default), domain divided 60x60 grid, whereas density linearly scales grid. cell grid can , , one traversing streamline. Default 2. arrow_size Size arrows. Default 5. arrow_length Length arrows. arrow_density Amount velocities show. calculate_velocity_genes Boolean flag indicating whether calculate velocity genes. denoise Boolean flag indicating whether denoise. kinetics Boolean flag indicating whether estimate RNA kinetics. kernel_type Type kernel use: "velocity" (default, requires spliced/unspliced), "pseudotime" (requires pre-computed pseudotime auto-computes DPT), "cytotrace" (auto-computes CytoTRACE score, suitable RNA-data), "wot" (uses Waddington-OT transport maps CellRank's RealTimeKernel). time_key Key metadata pseudotime. Used kernel_type = "pseudotime". key exist, DPT pseudotime computed automatically. Default "dpt_pseudotime". time_field Key metadata experimental time. Used kernel_type = "wot". growth_iters Number growth iterations passed wot.ot.OTModel. Default 3. tmap_out Directory used store read Waddington-OT transport maps. recalculate Whether recompute Waddington-OT transport maps even tmap_out already exists. Default FALSE. estimator_type Type estimator use: "GPCCA" (default) "CFLARE". GPCCA provides coarse-grained analysis Schur decomposition. use_connectivity_kernel Whether combine main kernel ConnectivityKernel. Default TRUE. velocity_weight Weight VelocityKernel combining ConnectivityKernel. Default 0.8. connectivity_weight Weight ConnectivityKernel combining VelocityKernel. Default 0.2. Weights automatically normalized sum 1.0. softmax_scale Scaling parameter softmax transformation velocity kernel. Default 4. n_macrostates Number macrostates compute. NULL (default), automatically determined based eigenvalue spectrum. schur_method Method Schur decomposition: "krylov" "brandts". used GPCCA estimator. n_cells_terminal Minimum number cells required state considered terminal. Default 10. show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". legend.position Position legend plots. Can "data", "right margin", "bottom right", etc. Default "data". palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
text: Returns Seurat object return_seurat = TRUE anndata object CellRank results stored obsm, obs, varm slots. estimator kernel objects stored srt@misc$cellrank.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunCellRank(   srt = pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType" )  CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "term_states_fwd",   reduction = "umap",   label = TRUE )  FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   features = "latent_time",   reduction = "umap" )  FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   features = c("stochastic_confidence", "stochastic_length"),   reduction = "umap" )  CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   reduction = "UMAP",   lineages = "cellrank_pseudotime",   lineages_span = 0.1,   lineages_trim = c(0.05, 0.95) )  DynamicPlot(   pancreas_sub,   lineages = "cellrank_pseudotime",   features = c("Arxes1", "Ncoa2"),   group.by = "SubCellType" ) } # }

code: RunCellTypist(   srt = NULL,   adata = NULL,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "data",   model = "Immune_All_Low.pkl",   mode = "best match",   p_thres = 0.5,   majority_voting = FALSE,   over_clustering = NULL,   min_prop = 0,   use_GPU = FALSE,   insert_labels = TRUE,   insert_conf = TRUE,   insert_conf_by = "predicted_labels",   insert_prob = FALSE,   insert_decision = FALSE,   prefix = "celltypist_",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. adata Optional AnnData object used input. assay assay use. Default "RNA". layer layer use. Default data. model Model name path. Default "Immune_All_Low.pkl". Supports three formats: Model name (e.g., "Immune_All_Low.pkl"): automatically searched ~/.celltypist/data/models/ Full path (contains /): use provided path directly NULL: use default model summary list returned TrainCellTypist(): use model_path mode Prediction mode: "best match" "prob match". Default "best match". p_thres Probability threshold "prob match" mode. Default 0.5. majority_voting Whether use majority voting. Default FALSE. over_clustering -clustering result. Can : String: column name Seurat metadata AnnData obs Vector: -clustering labels NULL: use heuristic -clustering min_prop Minimum proportion majority voting. Default 0. use_GPU Whether use GPU -clustering. Default FALSE. insert_labels Whether insert predicted labels. Default TRUE. insert_conf Whether insert confidence scores. Default TRUE. insert_conf_by prediction type base confidence . Default "predicted_labels". insert_prob Whether insert probability matrix. Default FALSE. insert_decision Whether insert decision matrix. Default FALSE. prefix Prefix inserted columns. Default "celltypist_". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CellphoneDB analysis — RunCellphoneDB
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . species Species input data. CellphoneDB human-centric; non-human species supplied convert_to_human = TRUE, gene symbols converted human ortholog symbols running analysis. assay Assay use. layer Layer use CellphoneDB input. Default "data" CellphoneDB generally expects normalized expression. counts_data Gene identifier type used CellphoneDB. One "hgnc_symbol", "ensembl", "gene_name". method CellphoneDB analysis mode. One "statistical_analysis", "analysis", "degs_analysis". cpdb_file_path Path cellphonedb.zip. NULL, wrapper try common locations download automatically found. convert_to_human Whether convert non-human gene symbols human ortholog symbols running CellphoneDB. gene_id_from_IDtype Input gene identifier type passed GeneConvert convert_to_human = TRUE. microenvs Optional CellphoneDB microenvironment specification. Can data.frame file path. active_tfs Optional CellphoneDB active TF specification. Can data.frame file path. degs Optional DEG table method = "degs_analysis". Can data.frame file path. score_interactions Whether compute CellphoneDB interaction scores. threshold Minimum fraction cells expressing gene gene considered. pvalue P-value threshold used CellphoneDB. iterations Number permutations statistical analysis. cores Number cores used CellphoneDB. separator Separator used CellphoneDB sender/receiver pair columns. debug Whether ask CellphoneDB save intermediate debug tables. debug_seed Random seed used CellphoneDB. result_precision Result precision used CellphoneDB. subsampling Whether enable CellphoneDB subsampling. subsampling_log Whether log-transform CellphoneDB subsampling. subsampling_num_pc Number PCs used CellphoneDB subsampling. subsampling_num_cells Number cells retained CellphoneDB subsampling. output_path Optional directory keep CellphoneDB output files. output_suffix Optional output suffix passed CellphoneDB. keep_output Whether keep temporary output files output_path supplied. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CytoSPACE spatial assignment — RunCytoSPACE

code: RunCytoSPACE(   srt,   reference,   reference_label,   assay = NULL,   reference_assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   reference_layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   cell_fractions = NULL,   n_cells_per_spot = NULL,   mean_cell_numbers = 5,   scRNA_max_transcripts_per_cell = 1500,   sampling_method = "duplicates",   seed = 1,   prefix = "CytoSPACE",   store_results = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CytoSPACE spatial assignment — RunCytoSPACE
text: srt Seurat object. reference Reference Seurat object containing annotated single cells. reference_label Metadata column reference cell type labels. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. reference_assay Assay used reference. layer, reference_layer Assay layers used spatial reference expression. features Features used assignment. NULL, shared features used. cell_fractions Optional cell-type fractions. Provide named numeric vector, one-row matrix/data.frame, spot--cell-type matrix/data.frame. Spot-level rows aggregated global composition used default CytoSPACE assignment workflow. n_cells_per_spot Optional number cells assigned spatial spot. NULL, counts estimated spatial RNA reads mean_cell_numbers. mean_cell_numbers Mean number cells per spot. Default 5, matching CytoSPACE Visium default. scRNA_max_transcripts_per_cell Maximum reference transcripts per cell assignment. Default 1500, matching CytoSPACE. sampling_method Sampling method. "duplicates" supported package runtime. seed Random seed used deterministic reference downsampling duplicate sampling. prefix Prefix metadata columns. store_results Whether store detailed assignment results srt@tools. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

code: data(visium_human_pancreas_sub) data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_human <- ConvertHomologs(   pancreas_sub,   species_from = "Mus_musculus",   species_to = "Homo_sapiens",   verbose = FALSE ) spatial <- RunCytoSPACE(   visium_human_pancreas_sub,   reference = pancreas_human,   reference_label = "CellType",   mean_cell_numbers = 1,   verbose = FALSE )  SpatialSpotPlot(   visium_human_pancreas_sub,   group.by = "coda_label",   theme_use = "theme_scop" )   SpatialSpotPlot(   spatial,   group.by = "CytoSPACE_dominant_type",   theme_use = "theme_scop" )

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: Predicts cellular developmental potential single-cell RNA-seq data using CytoTRACE 2 algorithm (Kang et al., 2025). native scop implementation C++ acceleration. algorithm consists five stages: Preprocessing: Gene orthology mapping, feature selection, ranking, log2-CPM transformation. GSBN Ensemble Prediction: 19 pre-trained Gene Set Binary Network models predict continuous developmental potency score (0-1) discrete potency category. Diffusion Smoothing: Markov random-walk--restart cell-cell similarity graph smooths raw scores. Binning: Within potency category, cells ranked linearly scaled corresponding segments unit interval. Adaptive kNN Smoothing: PCA-based nearest-neighbor consensus refinement final scores.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
code: RunCytoTRACE(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunCytoTRACE(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = c("counts", "data"),   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   batch_size = 10000,   smooth_batch_size = 1000,   cores = 1,   seed = 14,   data_dir = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunCytoTRACE(   object,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   batch_size = 10000,   smooth_batch_size = 1000,   cores = 1,   seed = 14,   data_dir = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: object object. can Seurat object matrix-like object (genes rows, cells columns). ... Additional arguments (reserved future use). assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default "counts". species species input data. Currently supported values "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". Default "Homo_sapiens". batch_size number cells process . datasets cells value, cells randomly split batches processed independently. batching NULL. Default 10000. smooth_batch_size number cells per subsample diffusion smoothing step. diffusion subsampling NULL. Default 1000. cores Number cores parallel processing. Default 1. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 14. data_dir Path directory containing CytoTRACE2 model data files. NULL, uses data prepared PrepareDB(), user data cache, auto-downloads datasets repository. Default NULL. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: input Seurat object, function returns Seurat object following metadata columns added: CytoTRACE2_Score: final predicted cellular potency score (0-1) CytoTRACE2_Potency: final predicted cellular potency category (Differentiated, Unipotent, Oligopotent, Multipotent, Pluripotent, Totipotent) CytoTRACE2_Relative: predicted relative order (normalized 0-1) preKNN_CytoTRACE2_Score: potency score KNN smoothing preKNN_CytoTRACE2_Potency: potency category KNN smoothing input matrix data.frame, function returns data.frame columns , cell IDs row names.

title: Differential gene test — RunDEtest
text: Perform differential expression testing Seurat object SummarizedExperiment bulk object. Users flexibility specify custom cell groups, marker types, various options DE analysis.

title: Differential gene test — RunDEtest
code: RunDEtest(object = NULL, ..., srt = NULL)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunDEtest(   object,   group.by = NULL,   group1 = NULL,   group2 = NULL,   ident.1 = NULL,   ident.2 = NULL,   cells1 = NULL,   cells2 = NULL,   cells.1 = NULL,   cells.2 = NULL,   features = NULL,   feature_type = c("gene", "peak", "cCRE"),   markers_type = c("all", "paired", "conserved", "disturbed"),   grouping.var = NULL,   meta.method = c("maximump", "minimump", "wilkinsonp", "meanp", "sump", "votep"),   test.use = "wilcox",   only.pos = TRUE,   fc.threshold = 1.5,   logfc.threshold = NULL,   base = 2,   pseudocount.use = 1,   mean.fxn = NULL,   min.pct = 0.1,   min.diff.pct = -Inf,   max.cells.per.ident = Inf,   latent.vars = NULL,   min.cells.feature = 3,   min.cells.group = 3,   norm.method = "LogNormalize",   sample_col = NULL,   condition_col = NULL,   bulk_assay = "counts",   p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",   layer = "data",   assay = NULL,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE,   cores = 1,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'SummarizedExperiment' RunDEtest(   object,   group.by = NULL,   group1 = NULL,   group2 = NULL,   cells1 = NULL,   cells2 = NULL,   features = NULL,   feature_type = c("gene", "peak", "cCRE"),   markers_type = c("all", "paired", "conserved", "disturbed"),   grouping.var = NULL,   meta.method = c("maximump", "minimump", "wilkinsonp", "meanp", "sump", "votep"),   test.use = "edgeR",   only.pos = TRUE,   fc.threshold = 1.5,   base = 2,   pseudocount.use = 1,   mean.fxn = NULL,   min.pct = 0.1,   min.diff.pct = -Inf,   max.cells.per.ident = Inf,   latent.vars = NULL,   min.cells.feature = 3,   min.cells.group = 3,   norm.method = "LogNormalize",   sample_col = NULL,   condition_col = NULL,   bulk_assay = "counts",   p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",   layer = "counts",   assay = NULL,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE,   cores = 1,   ... )

title: Differential gene test — RunDEtest
text: object Seurat object SummarizedExperiment object. ... Additional arguments pass Seurat::FindMarkers function. srt Compatibility alias object. group.grouping variable dataset define groups conditions differential test. provided, function uses "active.ident" variable Seurat object. group1 vector cell IDs character vector specifying cells belong first group. group.group1 provided, group1 takes precedence. sample-level methods ("edgeR", "limma", "DESeq2", "dream"), parameter interpreted first condition label. group2 vector cell IDs character vector specifying cells belong second group. parameter used group.group1 provided. sample-level methods ("edgeR", "limma", "DESeq2", "dream"), parameter interpreted second condition label. ident.1, ident.2 Seurat-style aliases group1 group2. cells1 vector cell IDs specifying cells belong group1. provided, group1 ignored. cells2 vector cell IDs specifying cells belong group2. parameter used cells1 provided. cells.1, cells.2 Seurat-style aliases cells1 cells2. features vector feature names specifying features consider differential test. provided, features dataset considered. feature_type Feature type used differential testing. Default "gene". markers_type character value specifying type markers find. Possible values "", "paired", "conserved", "disturbed". Sample-level methods ("edgeR", "limma", "DESeq2", "dream") currently support "". grouping.var character value specifying grouping variable finding conserved disturbed markers. parameter used markers_type "conserved" "disturbed". meta.method character value specifying method use combining p-values conserved markers test. Possible values "maximump", "minimump", "wilkinsonp", "meanp", "sump", "votep". test.use Differential testing method. "edgeR", "limma", "DESeq2", "dream" run sample-level pseudobulk differential testing Seurat input bulk DE SummarizedExperiment input. .pos return positive markers (FALSE default) fc.threshold numeric value used filter genes testing based average fold change /among two groups. Default 1.5. logfc.threshold Seurat-style log fold-change threshold. provided, converted fc.threshold = base^logfc.threshold. base base respect logarithms computed. pseudocount.use Pseudocount add averaged expression values calculating logFC. 1 default. mean.fxn Function use fold change average difference calculation. default depends value fc.slot: "counts" : difference log mean counts, pseudocount. "data" : difference log average exponentiated data, pseudocount.  adjusts differences sequencing depth cells, assumes "data"  log-normalized. "scale.data" : difference means scale.data. min.pct test genes detected minimum fraction min.pct cells either two populations. Meant speed function testing genes infrequently expressed. Default 0.01 min.diff.pct test genes show minimum difference fraction detection two groups. Set -Inf default max.cells.per.ident sample identity class max number. Default downsampling. activated default (set Inf) latent.vars Variables test, used test.use one 'LR', 'negbinom', 'poisson', 'MAST' min.cells.feature Minimum number cells expressing feature least one two groups, currently used poisson negative binomial tests min.cells.group Minimum number cells one groups norm.method Normalization method fold change calculation layer 'data'. Default "LogNormalize". sample_col Metadata column storing biological sample IDs. Required test.use sample-level pseudobulk method Seurat. condition_col Metadata column storing condition labels. Required test.use sample-level pseudobulk method Seurat, required SummarizedExperiment input. bulk_assay Assay name used bulk counts matrix SummarizedExperiment input. p.adjust.method character value specifying method use adjusting p-values. Default "bonferroni". layer layer use. Default data. assay Assay use differential expression testing seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1.

title: Run diffusion map (DM) — RunDM
code: RunDM(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunDM(   object,   reduction = "pca",   dims = 1:30,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   ndcs = 2,   sigma = "local",   k = 30,   dist.method = "euclidean",   npcs = NULL,   reduction.name = "dm",   reduction.key = "DM_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunDM(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   ndcs = 2,   sigma = "local",   k = 30,   dist.method = "euclidean",   npcs = NULL,   reduction.key = "DM_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run diffusion map (DM) — RunDM
text: object object. can Seurat object matrix-like object. ... Additional arguments passed destiny::DiffusionMap. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. ndcs number diffusion components (dimensions) computed. Default 2. sigma diffusion scale parameter Gaussian kernel. Currently supported values "local" (default) "global". k number nearest neighbors used construction graph. Default 30. dist.method distance metric used construction knn graph. Currently supported values "euclidean" "cosine". Default "euclidean". npcs Number principal components use dimensionality reduction computing diffusion map. can speed computation using many features. Default NULL (auto-determined based number features). reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "dm". reduction.key prefix column names basis vectors. Default "DM_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

code: RunDeconvolution(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'SummarizedExperiment' RunDeconvolution(   object,   reference,   method = c("MuSiC", "BisqueRNA", "BayesPrism"),   group.by,   sample.by = NULL,   cellstate.by = NULL,   bulk_assay = "counts",   ref_assay = NULL,   ref_layer = "counts",   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run bulk or pseudobulk deconvolution — RunDeconvolution
text: object SummarizedExperiment object containing bulk-like counts. ... Additional parameters forwarded internal deconvolution backend. reference Seurat reference object used build cell-type profiles. method Deconvolution method. One "MuSiC", "BisqueRNA", "BayesPrism". group.Metadata column reference defining reference cell types. sample.Metadata column reference defining biological sample / donor IDs. Used r backends MuSiC BisqueRNA. NULL, SCOP try infer suitable column automatically. cellstate.Metadata column reference defining cell states r backend BayesPrism. NULL, group.reused. bulk_assay Assay name object used bulk counts matrix. ref_assay Assay name reference used reference profiles. ref_layer Layer name reference used reference counts. backend Deconvolution engine backend. "r" uses original method package implementation. "cpp" reserved native SCOP implementations available. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

code: RunDimsEstimate(   srt,   reduction = NULL,   reduction_method = NULL,   k = 30L,   method = c("scree", "intrinsic", "ensemble"),   min_dims = 5L,   fallback_max_dims = 50L,   variance_threshold = 0.8,   marginal_gain_threshold = 0.5,   skip_first = FALSE,   use_stored = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Estimate useful dimensions from a reduction — RunDimsEstimate
text: srt Seurat object. reduction Name dimensional reduction inspect. Default NULL, automatically selects PCA-like reduction via DefaultReduction() pattern = "pca". reduction_method Optional reduction method name. set "nmf" "glmpca", available dimensions retained. k Number neighbors used intrinsicDimension::maxLikGlobalDimEst. Default 30. method Dimension-selection method. "scree" uses PCA standard deviations broken-stick, elbow, cumulative-variance, marginal-gain criteria. "intrinsic" uses intrinsicDimension::maxLikGlobalDimEst. "ensemble" keeps larger recommendation methods available. Default "scree". min_dims Minimum number dimensions kept intrinsic-dimension estimation succeeds. Default 5. fallback_max_dims Maximum number dimensions kept valid estimate available. Default 50. variance_threshold Cumulative variance threshold used method = "scree". Default 0.8. marginal_gain_threshold Stop point marginal variance gain (percentage points) used method = "scree". Default 0.5. skip_first Whether drop first dimension returned result. Useful TFIDF/LSI workflows. Default FALSE. use_stored Whether use misc$dims_estimate already stored reduction available. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

code: RunDoubletCalling(   srt,   assay = "RNA",   db_rate = ncol(srt)/1000 * 0.01,   db_method = "scDblFinder",   data_type = NULL,   ... )

title: Run doublet-calling for single cell RNA-seq data. — RunDoubletCalling
text: srt Seurat object. assay name assay used doublet-calling. Default "RNA". db_rate expected doublet rate. Default calculated ncol(srt) / 1000 * 0.01. db_method Method used doublet-calling. Can one "scDblFinder", "Scrublet", "DoubletDetection", "scds_cxds", "scds_bcds", "scds_hybrid". data_type Optional precomputed result CheckDataType() input assay. Primarily used internally avoid repeated scans count matrix across nested QC calls. ... Additional arguments passed corresponding doublet-calling method.

title: Run doublet-calling for single cell RNA-seq data. — RunDoubletCalling
text: Returns Seurat object doublet prediction results prediction scores stored meta.data.

title: RunDynamicEnrichment — RunDynamicEnrichment
text: function calculates gene-set scores specified database (db) lineage using specified scoring method (score_method). treats scores expression values uses input RunDynamicFeatures function identify dynamically enriched terms along lineage.

title: RunDynamicEnrichment — RunDynamicEnrichment
code: RunDynamicEnrichment(   srt,   lineages,   score_method = "AUCell",   layer = "data",   assay = NULL,   min_expcells = 20,   r.sq = 0.2,   dev.expl = 0.2,   padjust = 0.05,   IDtype = "symbol",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   features = NULL,   TERM2GENE = NULL,   TERM2NAME = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   cpp_strategy = c("sparse", "topk", "full"),   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11,   ... )

title: RunDynamicEnrichment — RunDynamicEnrichment
text: srt Seurat object SummarizedExperiment object containing results differential expression analysis (RunDEtest()). specified, genes groups extracted object automatically. specified, geneID geneID_groups arguments must provided. lineages character vector specifying lineage names dynamic features calculated. score_method method use scoring. Can "Seurat", "AUCell", "UCell", "GSVA", "ssGSEA", "zscore", "PLAGE", "VISION". Multiple methods can supplied ; method written method-suffixed assay dynamic-feature fitting. Default "AUCell". layer layer use. Default "counts". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. min_expcells minimum number expected cells. Default 20. r.sq R-squared threshold. Default 0.2. dev.expl deviance explained threshold. Default 0.2. padjust p-value adjustment threshold. Default 0.05. IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2". Note: "CytoTRACE2" species-independent downloads pre-trained model data required RunCytoTRACE. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". features named list feature lists custom enrichment gene sets. provided, takes precedence TERM2GENE db. TERM2GENE data frame specifying gene-term mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain gene IDs. TERM2NAME data frame specifying term-name mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain corresponding term names. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. backend Enrichment backend. "cpp" default uses fast native hypergeometric ORA implementation returns enrichment table without enrichResult objects. "r" uses clusterProfiler::enricher() returns enrichResult objects results. GO_simplify = TRUE currently uses R backend. cpp_strategy C++ AUCell ranking strategy. "sparse" ranks non-zero genes approximates zero ties, "topk" ranks genes can contribute AUCell AUC, "full" ranks genes. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. ... Additional arguments passed scoring methods.

what: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
title: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
text: Calculates dynamic features lineages

title: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
code: RunDynamicFeatures(   srt,   lineages,   features = NULL,   suffix = lineages,   n_candidates = 1000,   minfreq = 5,   family = NULL,   layer = "counts",   assay = NULL,   libsize = NULL,   fit_method = c("gam", "pretsa"),   knot = 0,   max_knot_allowed = 10,   padjust_method = "fdr",   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
text: srt Seurat object. lineages character vector specifying lineage names dynamic features calculated. features character vector features use. NULL, n_candidates must provided. suffix character vector specifying suffix append output layer names lineage. Default lineage names. n_candidates number candidate features select features NULL. Default 1000. minfreq integer specifying minimum frequency threshold candidate features. Features frequency less minfreq excluded. Default 5. family character character vector specifying family distributions use GAM. family set NULL, appropriate family automatically determined based data. length(family) 1, family used features. Otherwise, family must length features. layer layer use. Default "counts". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. libsize numeric numeric vector specifying library size correction factors cell. NULL, library size correction factors calculated based expression matrix. length(libsize) 1, value used cells. Otherwise, libsize must length number cells srt. Default NULL. fit_method method used fitting features. Either "gam" (generalized additive models) "pretsa" (Pattern recognition Temporal Spatial Analyses). Default "gam". knot fit_method = "pretsa": B-spline knots. 0 "auto". Default 0. max_knot_allowed fit_method = "pretsa" knot = "auto": max knots. Default 10. padjust_method method used p-value adjustment. Default "fdr". cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

what: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
text: Perform enrichment analysis (-representation) genes

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
code: RunEnrichment(   srt = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   test.use = "wilcox",   DE_threshold = "avg_log2FC > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05",   geneID = NULL,   geneID_groups = NULL,   geneID_exclude = NULL,   IDtype = "symbol",   result_IDtype = "symbol",   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   db_combine = FALSE,   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   features = NULL,   TERM2GENE = NULL,   TERM2NAME = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   unlimited_db = c("Chromosome", "GeneType", "TF", "Enzyme", "CSPA"),   GO_simplify = FALSE,   GO_simplify_cutoff = "p.adjust < 0.05",   simplify_method = "Wang",   simplify_similarityCutoff = 0.7,   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
text: srt Seurat object SummarizedExperiment object containing results differential expression analysis (RunDEtest()). specified, genes groups extracted object automatically. specified, geneID geneID_groups arguments must provided. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . test.use character vector specifying test used differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. DE_threshold character vector specifying filter condition differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. geneID character vector specifying gene IDs. geneID_groups factor vector specifying group labels gene. geneID_exclude character vector specifying gene IDs excluded analysis. IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. result_IDtype character vector specifying desired type gene ID used output. argument used convert gene IDs IDtype result_IDtype. backend Enrichment backend. "cpp" default uses fast native hypergeometric ORA implementation returns enrichment table without enrichResult objects. "r" uses clusterProfiler::enricher() returns enrichResult objects results. GO_simplify = TRUE currently uses R backend. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2". Note: "CytoTRACE2" species-independent downloads pre-trained model data required RunCytoTRACE. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether combine multiple databases one. TRUE, database specified db combined one named "Combined". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". features named list feature lists custom enrichment gene sets. provided, takes precedence TERM2GENE db. TERM2GENE data frame specifying gene-term mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain gene IDs. TERM2NAME data frame specifying term-name mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain corresponding term names. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. unlimited_db character vector specifying names databases size restrictions. GO_simplify Whether simplify GO terms. TRUE, additional results simplified GO terms returned. GO_simplify_cutoff character vector specifying filter condition simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. simplify_method character vector specifying method used simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. simplify_similarityCutoff similarity cutoff simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
text: input Seurat object, returns modified Seurat object enrichment result stored tools slot. input geneID vector without geneID_groups, return enrichment result directly. Enrichment result list following component: enrichment: data.frame containing enrichment results. results: list enrichResult objects DOSE package. geneMap: data.frame containing ID mapping table input gene IDs. input: data.frame containing input gene IDs gene ID groups. DE_threshold: specific threshold differential expression analysis (returned input Seurat object).

title: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm) — RunFR
text: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm)

title: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm) — RunFR
code: RunFR(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunFR(   object,   reduction = NULL,   dims = NULL,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   graph = NULL,   neighbor = NULL,   k.param = 20,   ndim = 2,   niter = 500,   reduction.name = "FR",   reduction.key = "FR_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunFR(   object,   assay = NULL,   ndim = 2,   niter = 500,   reduction.key = "FR_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )

title: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm) — RunFR
text: object object. can Seurat object, Neighbor object, Graph object. Default NULL. ... Additional arguments passed igraph::layout_with_fr. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. graph name Graph object used. Default NULL. neighbor name Neighbor object used. Default NULL. k.param number nearest neighbors consider. Default 20. ndim number dimensions force-directed layout. Default 2. niter number iterations force-directed layout. Default 500. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "fr". reduction.key prefix column names force-directed layout embeddings. Default "FR_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm) — RunFR

title: Run generalized principal components analysis (GLMPCA) — RunGLMPCA
text: Run generalized principal components analysis (GLMPCA)

title: Run generalized principal components analysis (GLMPCA) — RunGLMPCA
code: RunGLMPCA(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.name = "glmpca",   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay' RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay5' RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run generalized principal components analysis (GLMPCA) — RunGLMPCA
text: object object. Can Seurat object, assay object, matrix-like object. ... Additional arguments passed glmpca::glmpca function. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. features character vector features use. Default NULL. L number components computed. Default 5. fam family generalized linear model used. Currently supported values "poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern". Default "poi". rev.gmlpca Whether perform reverse GLMPCA (.e., transpose input matrix) running analysis. Default FALSE. ndims.print dimensions (number components) print output. Default 1:5. nfeatures.print number features print output. Default 30. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "glmpca". reduction.key prefix column names basis vectors. Default "GLMPC_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (GSEA) on the genes — RunGSEA
text: Perform enrichment analysis (GSEA) genes

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (GSEA) on the genes — RunGSEA
code: RunGSEA(   srt = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   test.use = "wilcox",   DE_threshold = "p_val_adj < 0.05",   scoreType = "std",   geneID = NULL,   geneScore = NULL,   geneID_groups = NULL,   geneID_exclude = NULL,   IDtype = "symbol",   result_IDtype = "symbol",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   db_combine = FALSE,   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   features = NULL,   TERM2GENE = NULL,   TERM2NAME = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   unlimited_db = c("Chromosome", "GeneType", "TF", "Enzyme", "CSPA"),   GO_simplify = FALSE,   GO_simplify_cutoff = "p.adjust < 0.05",   simplify_method = "Wang",   simplify_similarityCutoff = 0.7,   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (GSEA) on the genes — RunGSEA
text: srt Seurat object SummarizedExperiment object containing results differential expression analysis (RunDEtest()). specified, genes groups extracted object automatically. specified, geneID geneID_groups arguments must provided. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . test.use character vector specifying test used differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. DE_threshold character vector specifying filter condition differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. scoreType parameter defines GSEA score type. Possible options "std", "pos", "neg". default ("std") enrichment score computed original GSEA. "pos" "neg" score types intended used one-tailed tests (.e. one interested positive ("pos") negateive ("neg") enrichment). geneID character vector specifying gene IDs. geneScore numeric vector specifies gene scores, example, log2(fold change) values gene expression. geneID_groups factor vector specifying group labels gene. geneID_exclude character vector specifying gene IDs excluded analysis. IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. result_IDtype character vector specifying desired type gene ID used output. argument used convert gene IDs IDtype result_IDtype. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2". Note: "CytoTRACE2" species-independent downloads pre-trained model data required RunCytoTRACE. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether combine multiple databases one. TRUE, database specified db combined one named "Combined". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". features named list feature lists custom enrichment gene sets. provided, takes precedence TERM2GENE db. TERM2GENE data frame specifying gene-term mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain gene IDs. TERM2NAME data frame specifying term-name mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain corresponding term names. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. unlimited_db character vector specifying names databases size restrictions. GO_simplify Whether simplify GO terms. TRUE, additional results simplified GO terms returned. GO_simplify_cutoff character vector specifying filter condition simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. simplify_method character vector specifying method used simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. simplify_similarityCutoff similarity cutoff simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (GSEA) on the genes — RunGSEA
text: input Seurat object, returns modified Seurat object enrichment result stored tools slot. input geneID vector without geneID_groups, return enrichment result directly. Enrichment result list following component: enrichment: data.frame containing enrichment results. results: list gseaResult objects DOSE package. geneMap: data.frame containing ID mapping table input gene IDs. input: data.frame containing input gene IDs gene ID groups. DE_threshold: specific threshold differential expression analysis (returned input Seurat object).

title: Perform Gene Set Variation Analysis (GSVA) — RunGSVA
code: RunGSVA(   srt = NULL,   assay = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   layer = "data",   assay_name = "GSVA",   new_assay = TRUE,   store_metadata = NULL,   db = "GO_BP",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   IDtype = "symbol",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   db_combine = FALSE,   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   features = NULL,   TERM2GENE = NULL,   TERM2NAME = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   unlimited_db = c("Chromosome", "GeneType", "TF", "Enzyme", "CSPA"),   method = c("gsva", "ssgsea", "zscore", "plage"),   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   cpp_chunk_size = NULL,   kcdf = c("Gaussian", "Poisson"),   abs.ranking = FALSE,   min.sz = 10,   max.sz = Inf,   mx.diff = TRUE,   tau = 1,   ssgsea.norm = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Perform Gene Set Variation Analysis (GSVA) — RunGSVA
text: srt Seurat object SummarizedExperiment object containing results differential expression analysis (RunDEtest()). specified, genes groups extracted object automatically. specified, geneID geneID_groups arguments must provided. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. group.Name metadata column group cells averaging expression. provided, expression averaged within group GSVA analysis (cell-type level). NULL, GSVA performed cell individually (single-cell level). layer Data layer use group.= NULL. Usually "data" normalized "counts" count matrix. Default "data". assay_name Name assay store GSVA scores group.= NULL new_assay = TRUE. Default "GSVA". new_assay Whether create new assay GSVA scores group.= NULL. Default TRUE. store_metadata Whether also store single-cell GSVA scores meta.data. NULL, custom features TERM2GENE input stored meta.data default, database-derived results stay assay-new_assay = TRUE. db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2". Note: "CytoTRACE2" species-independent downloads pre-trained model data required RunCytoTRACE. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether combine multiple databases one. TRUE, database specified db combined one named "Combined". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". features named list feature lists custom enrichment gene sets. provided, takes precedence TERM2GENE db. TERM2GENE data frame specifying gene-term mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain gene IDs. TERM2NAME data frame specifying term-name mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain corresponding term names. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. unlimited_db character vector specifying names databases size restrictions. method method use GSVA. Options "gsva", "ssgsea", "zscore", "plage". Multiple methods can supplied ; single-cell mode stored method-suffixed assays "GSVA_gsva" "GSVA_ssgsea". Default "gsva". backend Scoring backend. "cpp" default supports current method values. "r" uses original GSVA::gsva() implementation. "cpp" supports method = "ssgsea", method = "zscore", method = "plage", method = "gsva" kcdf = "Gaussian" kcdf = "Poisson". PLAGE scores oriented non-negative dot product gene set mean z-score SVD signs deterministic. cpp_chunk_size Optional cell chunk size C++ GSVA kernels. NULL "auto" automatically chunks large matrices reduce peak dense intermediate memory; positive values set chunk size manually. kcdf kernel cumulative distribution function used GSVA. Options "Gaussian" (continuous data) "Poisson" (count data). Default "Gaussian". abs.ranking Logical indicating whether use absolute ranking GSVA. Default FALSE. min.sz Minimum size gene sets included analysis. Default 10. max.sz Maximum size gene sets included analysis. Default Inf. mx.diff Logical indicating whether use maximum difference method. Default TRUE. tau Exponent GSVA method. Default 1. ssgsea.norm Logical indicating whether normalize SSGSEA scores. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Perform Gene Set Variation Analysis (GSVA) — RunGSVA
text: Returns modified Seurat object. group.provided, GSVA scores stored tools slot. group.= NULL, scores stored tools slot, optionally new assay, optionally meta.data direct use FeatureDimPlot() FeatureStatPlot().

title: Run Harmony algorithm — RunHarmony2
text: modified version harmony::RunHarmony specifically designed compatibility RunSymphonyMap.

title: Run Harmony algorithm — RunHarmony2
code: RunHarmony2(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunHarmony2(   object,   group.by.vars,   assay = NULL,   reduction = "pca",   dims.use = 1:30,   project.dim = TRUE,   reduction.name = "Harmony",   reduction.save = NULL,   reduction.key = "Harmony_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run Harmony algorithm — RunHarmony2
text: object Seurat object. ... Additional arguments passed harmony::RunHarmony. group..vars batch variable name. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims.use dimensions used. Default 1:30. project.dim Whether project dimension reduction loadings. Default TRUE. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "Harmony". reduction.save Deprecated alias reduction.name, retained compatibility harmony::RunHarmony.Seurat. reduction.key prefix column names Harmony embeddings. Default "Harmony_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

what: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap
title: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap
text: function performs single-cell reference mapping using K-nearest neighbor (KNN) method. takes two single-cell datasets input: srt_query srt_ref. function maps cells srt_query dataset srt_ref dataset based similarity distance.

title: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap
code: RunKNNMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = NULL,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   features = NULL,   nfeatures = 2000,   query_reduction = NULL,   ref_reduction = NULL,   query_dims = 1:30,   ref_dims = 1:30,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean" )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. features vector feature names include heatmap. provided, highly variable features (HVF) used. nfeatures maximum number features include heatmap. Default 2000. query_reduction character string specifying name dimensionality reduction query object use calculating distance metric. ref_reduction character string specifying name dimensionality reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. query_dims numeric vector specifying dimension indices query reduction used calculating distance metric. ref_dims numeric vector specifying dimension indices reference reduction used calculating distance metric. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

title: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap
text: Seurat object projection results stored "ref.embeddings" reduction. ref_group provided, function also add new metadata column called "predicted_ref_group" query object.

title: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap

title: Run KNN prediction — RunKNNPredict
text: function performs KNN prediction annotate cell types based reference scRNA-seq bulk RNA-seq data.

title: Run KNN prediction — RunKNNPredict
code: RunKNNPredict(   srt_query,   srt_ref = NULL,   bulk_ref = NULL,   query_group = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = NULL,   query_reduction = NULL,   ref_reduction = NULL,   query_dims = 1:30,   ref_dims = 1:30,   query_collapsing = !is.null(query_group),   ref_collapsing = TRUE,   return_full_distance_matrix = FALSE,   features = NULL,   features_type = c("HVF", "DE"),   feature_source = "both",   nfeatures = 2000,   DEtest_param = list(max.cells.per.ident = 200, test.use = "wilcox"),   DE_threshold = "p_val_adj < 0.05",   nn_method = NULL,   distance_metric = "cosine",   k = 30,   filter_lowfreq = 0,   prefix = "KNNPredict" )

title: Run KNN prediction — RunKNNPredict
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref object class Seurat storing reference cells. bulk_ref cell atlas matrix, cell types represented columns genes represented rows. Either srt_ref bulk_ref must provided. query_group character vector specifying column name srt_query metadata represents cell grouping. ref_group character vector specifying column name srt_ref metadata represents cell grouping. query_assay character vector specifying assay used query data. Default default assay srt_query object. ref_assay character vector specifying assay used reference data. Default default assay srt_ref object. query_reduction character vector specifying dimensionality reduction method used query data. NULL, function use default reduction method specified srt_query object. ref_reduction character vector specifying dimensionality reduction method used reference data. NULL, function use default reduction method specified srt_ref object. query_dims numeric vector specifying dimensions used query data. Default first 30 dimensions. ref_dims numeric vector specifying dimensions used reference data. Default first 30 dimensions. query_collapsing boolean value indicating whether query data collapsed group-level average expression values. TRUE, function calculate average expression values group query data annotation performed separately group. Otherwise use raw expression values cell. ref_collapsing boolean value indicating whether reference data collapsed group-level average expression values. TRUE, function calculate average expression values group reference data annotation performed separately group. Otherwise use raw expression values cell. return_full_distance_matrix boolean value indicating whether full distance matrix returned. TRUE, function return distance matrix used KNN prediction, otherwise return annotated cell types. features character vector specifying features used KNN prediction. NULL, features query reference data used. features_type character vector specifying type features used KNN prediction. Must one "HVF" (highly variable features) "DE" (differentially expressed features). Default "HVF". feature_source source features used. Must one "", "query", "ref". Default "". nfeatures integer specifying maximum number features used KNN prediction. Default 2000. DEtest_param list parameters passed differential expression test function features_type set "DE". Default list(max.cells.per.ident = 200, test.use = "wilcox"). DE_threshold Threshold used filter DE features. using "roc" test, DE_threshold needs reassigned. e.g. "power > 0.5". Default "p_val < 0.05". nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. distance_metric character vector specifying distance metric used calculating similarity cells. Must one "cosine", "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "cosine". k number nearest neighbors considered KNN prediction. Default 30. filter_lowfreq integer specifying threshold filtering low-frequency cell types predicted results. Cell types frequency lower filter_lowfreq labelled "unreliable". Default 0, means filtering performed. prefix character vector specifying prefix added resulting annotations. Default "KNNPredict".

title: Run LIANA cell-cell communication analysis — RunLIANA
code: RunLIANA(   srt,   group.by,   method = c("natmi", "connectome", "logfc", "sca", "cellphonedb"),   resource = "Consensus",   assay = NULL,   min_cells = 5,   return_all = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run LIANA cell-cell communication analysis — RunLIANA
text: srt Seurat object. group.Metadata column defining cell groups. Passed liana::liana_wrap() idents_col. method LIANA methods run. Defaults LIANA's internal methods. resource LIANA ligand-receptor resource(s). Default "Consensus". assay Assay used LIANA. NULL, LIANA uses default assay. min_cells Minimum cells per identity retained LIANA. return_all Whether LIANA return possible interactions. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed liana::liana_wrap().

title: Run LIANA cell-cell communication analysis — RunLIANA
text: Seurat object LIANA results stored srt@tools[["LIANA"]].

what: Compute LISI scores on a Seurat object — RunLISI
title: Compute LISI scores on a Seurat object — RunLISI
text: Compute per-cell Local Inverse Simpson's Index (LISI) scores dimensional reduction store meta.data tools slots Seurat object.

title: Compute LISI scores on a Seurat object — RunLISI
code: RunLISI(   srt,   reductions = NULL,   reduction = NULL,   dims = NULL,   label_colnames = NULL,   prefix = NULL,   tool_name = NULL,   perplexity = 30,   nn_method = c("auto", "exact"),   tol = 1e-05,   max_iter = 50,   overwrite = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Compute LISI scores on a Seurat object — RunLISI
text: srt Seurat object. reductions Character vector dimensional reductions used compute LISI. NULL, DefaultReduction() used. reduction Deprecated alias reductions. dims Dimensions use reduction. Default NULL, uses available dimensions. label_colnames Character vector metadata columns used LISI. NULL, RunLISI() try use srt@misc[["integration_batch"]]. prefix Prefix used stored LISI metadata columns. NULL, reduction names used. tool_name Name used store detailed results srt@tools. Default "LISI" multiple reductions provided, otherwise paste0(prefix, "_LISI"). perplexity Effective neighborhood size. Default 30. nn_method Nearest-neighbor backend. One "auto" "exact". Default "auto", lets thisutils choose fastest exact backend available. Requires accelerated thisutils::compute_lisi() interface exposes nn_method = c("auto", "exact"). tol Tolerance used binary search target perplexity. Default 1e-5. max_iter Maximum number binary-search iterations. Default 50. overwrite Whether overwrite existing metadata columns. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Compute LISI scores on a Seurat object — RunLISI

what: Transfer reference labels to query cells — RunLabelTransfer
title: Transfer reference labels to query cells — RunLabelTransfer
text: Standalone label-transfer workflow query cells using reference object. current implementation optimized scATAC query objects mapped scRNA-seq reference via gene activity.

title: Transfer reference labels to query cells — RunLabelTransfer
code: RunLabelTransfer(   srt,   reference,   assay = NULL,   method = c("Seurat", "scOMM"),   prefix = "ATAC",   reference_assay = NULL,   reference_reduction = "pca",   reference_dims = 1:30,   reference_label = NULL,   add_gene_activity = TRUE,   gene_activity_assay = "ACTIVITY",   weight_reduction = NULL,   dims = 2:30,   features = NULL,   prediction_prefix = NULL,   k.weight = 100,   evaluate = FALSE,   truth_col = NULL,   tool_name = NULL,   rare_threshold = 0.05,   scomm_python = NULL,   scomm_hidden_nodes = c(128, 64),   scomm_epochs = 10,   scomm_batch_size = 32,   scomm_threshold = 0.5,   scomm_seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Transfer reference labels to query cells — RunLabelTransfer

Default 2. metric Type distance metric use find nearest neighbors.  nn_method = "annoy" can one : "euclidean" (default) "cosine" "manhattan" "hamming" "correlation" (distance based Pearson correlation) "categorical" (see ) nn_method = "hnsw" can one : "euclidean" "cosine" "correlation" rnndescent installed nn_method = "nndescent" specified many metrics avaiable, including: "braycurtis" "canberra" "chebyshev" "dice" "hamming" "hellinger" "jaccard" "jensenshannon" "kulsinski" "rogerstanimoto" "russellrao" "sokalmichener" "sokalsneath" "spearmanr" "symmetrickl" "tsss" "yule" details see package documentation rnndescent. nn_method = "fnn", distance metric always "euclidean". Factor columns treated different numeric columns although multiple factor columns can specified vector, factor column specified processed individually. specify non-factor column, coerced factor. given data block, may override pca pca_center arguments block, providing list one unnamed item containing column names ids, pca pca_center overrides named items, e.g. metric = list(euclidean = 1:4, manhattan = list(5:10, pca_center = FALSE)). exists allow mixed binary real-valued data included PCA applied , centering applied real-valued data (typical apply centering binary data PCA applied). n_epochs Number epochs use optimization embedded coordinates. default calculate number epochs dynamically based dataset size, give number edge samples LargeVis defaults. usually substantially larger UMAP defaults. n_epochs = 0, coordinates determined "init" returned. learning_rate Initial learning rate used optimization coordinates. scale Scaling apply X data frame matrix: "none" FALSE NULL scaling. "Z" "scale" TRUE Scale column   zero mean variance 1. "maxabs" Center column mean 0, divide   element maximum absolute value entire matrix. "range" Range scale entire matrix, smallest   element 0 largest 1. "colrange" Scale column range (0,1). lvish, default "maxabs", consistency LargeVis. init Type initialization coordinates. Options : "spectral" Spectral embedding using normalized Laplacian    fuzzy 1-skeleton, Gaussian noise added. "normlaplacian". Spectral embedding using normalized    Laplacian fuzzy 1-skeleton, without noise. "random". Coordinates assigned using uniform random    distribution -10 10. "lvrandom". Coordinates assigned using Gaussian    distribution standard deviation 1e-4, used LargeVis    (Tang et al., 2016) t-SNE. "laplacian". Spectral embedding using Laplacian Eigenmap    (Belkin Niyogi, 2002). "pca". first two principal components PCA    X X data frame, 2-dimensional classical    MDS X class "dist". "spca". Like "pca", dimension scaled    standard deviation 1e-4, give distribution similar    used t-SNE LargeVis. alias init = "pca",    init_sdev = 1e-4. "agspectral" "approximate global" modification    "spectral" edges graph value 1,    sets random number edges (negative_sample_rate edges per    vertex) 0.1, approximate effect non-local affinities. matrix initial coordinates. spectral initializations, ("spectral", "normlaplacian", "laplacian", "agspectral"), one connected component identified, spectral initialization attempted. Instead PCA-based initialization attempted. verbose = TRUE number connected components logged console. existence multiple connected components implies global view data attained initialization. Increasing value n_neighbors may help. init_sdev non-NULL, scales dimension initialized coordinates (including user-supplied matrix) standard deviation. default scaling carried , except init = "spca", case value 0.0001. Scaling input may help unscaled versions result initial coordinates large inter-point distances outliers. usually results small gradients optimization little progress made layout. Shrinking initial embedding rescaling can help circumstances. Scaling result init = "pca" usually recommended init = "spca" alias init = "pca", init_sdev = 1e-4 spectral initializations scaled versions usually necessary unless using large value n_neighbors (e.g. n_neighbors = 150 higher). compatibility recent versions Python UMAP package, using init = "spectral", also set init_sdev = "range", range scale columns containing initial data 0-10. set default maintain backwards compatibility previous versions uwot. repulsion_strength Weighting applied negative samples low dimensional embedding optimization. Values higher one result greater weight given negative samples. negative_sample_rate number negative edge/1-simplex samples use per positive edge/1-simplex sample optimizing low dimensional embedding. nn_method Method finding nearest neighbors. Options : "fnn". Use exact nearest neighbors via     FNN package. "annoy" Use approximate nearest neighbors via     RcppAnnoy package. "hnsw" Use approximate nearest neighbors     Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW) method (Malkov Yashunin,     2018) via     RcppHNSW package.     RcppHNSW dependency package: option     available installed RcppHNSW . Also,     HNSW supports following arguments metric:     "euclidean", "cosine" "correlation". "nndescent" Use approximate nearest neighbors     Nearest Neighbor Descent method (Dong et al., 2011) via     rnndescent     package. rnndescent dependency package:     option available installed rnndescent     . default, X less 4,096 vertices, exact nearest neighbors found. Otherwise, approximate nearest neighbors used. may also pass precalculated nearest neighbor data argument. must list consisting two elements: "idx". n_vertices x n_neighbors matrix   containing integer indexes nearest neighbors X.   vertex considered nearest neighbor, .e.   idx[, 1] == 1:n_vertices. "dist". n_vertices x n_neighbors matrix   containing distances nearest neighbors. Multiple nearest neighbor data (e.g. two different precomputed metrics) can passed passing list containing nearest neighbor data lists items. n_neighbors parameter ignored using precomputed nearest neighbor data. n_trees Number trees build constructing nearest neighbor index. trees specified, larger index, better results. search_k, determines accuracy Annoy nearest neighbor search. used nn_method "annoy". Sensible values 10 100. search_k Number nodes search neighbor retrieval. larger k, accurate results, longer search takes. n_trees, determines accuracy Annoy nearest neighbor search. used nn_method "annoy". n_threads Number threads use (except stochastic gradient descent). Default half number concurrent threads supported system. nearest neighbor search, applies nn_method = "annoy". n_threads > 1, Annoy index temporarily written disk location determined tempfile. n_sgd_threads Number threads use stochastic gradient descent. set > 1, aware batch = FALSE, results reproducible, even set.seed called fixed seed running. Set "auto" use value n_threads. grain_size minimum amount work thread. value set high enough, less n_threads n_sgd_threads used processing, might give performance improvement overhead thread management context switching outweighing improvement due concurrent processing. left default (1) work spread evenly threads specified. kernel Type kernel function create input probabilities. Can one "gauss" (default) "knn". "gauss" uses usual Gaussian weighted similarities. "knn" assigns equal probabilities every edge nearest neighbor graph, zero otherwise, using perplexity nearest neighbors. n_neighbors parameter ignored case. pca set positive integer value, reduce data number columns using PCA. applied distance metric "hamming", dimensions data larger number specified (.e. number rows columns must larger value parameter). > 100 columns data frame matrix, reducing number columns way may substantially increase performance nearest neighbor search cost potential decrease accuracy. many t-SNE applications, value 50 recommended, although guarantee appropriate settings. pca_center TRUE, center columns X carrying PCA. binary data, recommended set FALSE. pcg_rand TRUE, use PCG random number generator (O'Neill, 2014) optimization. Otherwise, use faster (probably less statistically good) Tausworthe "taus88" generator. default TRUE. parameter superseded rng_type – set, rng_type takes precedence. fast_sgd TRUE, following combination parameters set: pcg_rand = TRUE n_sgd_threads = "auto". default FALSE. Setting TRUE speed stochastic optimization phase, give potentially less accurate embedding, exactly reproducible even fixed seed. visualization, fast_sgd = TRUE give perfectly good results. generic dimensionality reduction, safer leave fast_sgd = FALSE. fast_sgd = TRUE, user-supplied values pcg_rand n_sgd_threads, ignored. batch TRUE, embedding coordinates updated end epoch rather epoch. batch mode, results reproducible fixed random seed even n_sgd_threads > 1, cost slightly higher memory use. may also modify learning_rate increase n_epochs, whether provides speed increase single-threaded optimization likely dataset hardware-dependent. opt_args list optimizer parameters, used batch = TRUE. default optimization method used Adam (Kingma Ba, 2014). method optimization method use. Either "adam"   "sgd" (stochastic gradient descent). Default: "adam". beta1 (Adam ). weighting parameter   exponential moving average first moment estimator. Effectively   momentum parameter. floating point value 0 1.   Higher values can smooth oscillatory updates poorly-conditioned   situations may allow larger learning_rate   specified, high can cause divergence. Default: 0.5. beta2 (Adam ). weighting parameter   exponential moving average uncentered second moment estimator.   floating point value 0 1. Controls degree   adaptivity step-size. Higher values put weight previous   time steps. Default: 0.9. eps (Adam ). Intended small value prevent   division zero, practice can also affect convergence due   interaction beta2. Higher values reduce effect   step-size adaptivity bring behavior closer stochastic gradient   descent momentum. Typical values 1e-8 1e-3. Default:   1e-7. alpha initial learning rate. Default: value   learning_rate parameter. epoch_callback function invoked end every epoch. signature : (epoch, n_epochs, coords), : epoch current epoch number (1   n_epochs). n_epochs Number epochs use optimization   embedded coordinates. coords embedded coordinates end current   epoch, matrix dimensions (N, n_components). pca_method Method carry PCA dimensionality reduction pca parameter specified. Allowed values : "irlba", "rsvd", "bigstatsr", "svd", "auto". Uses "irlba", unless 50 case "svd" used. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "largevis". reduction.key prefix column names LargeVis embeddings. Default "LargeVis_". verbose TRUE, log details console. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.
