title: Run MDS (multi-dimensional scaling) — RunMDS
text: object object. can Seurat object, assay object, matrix-like object. ... Additional arguments passed stats::cmdscale, MASS::isoMDS MASS::sammon. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. features character vector features use. Default NULL. nmds number dimensions computed. Default 50. dist.method distance metric used. Currently supported values "euclidean", "chisquared", "kullback", "jeffreys", "jensen", "manhattan", "maximum", "canberra", "minkowski", "hamming". Default "euclidean". mds.method MDS algorithm used. Currently supported values "cmdscale", "isoMDS", "sammon". Default "cmdscale". rev.mds Whether perform reverse MDS (.e., transpose input matrix) running analysis. Default FALSE. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "mds". reduction.key prefix column names basis vectors. Default "MDS_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run metabolism pathway scoring — RunMetabolism
code: RunMetabolism(   srt,   assay = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   layer = "counts",   db = c("KEGG", "REACTOME"),   species = "Homo_sapiens",   IDtype = "symbol",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   method = c("AUCell", "GSVA", "ssGSEA", "VISION"),   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   cpp_strategy = c("sparse", "topk", "full"),   cpp_chunk_size = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   assay_name = "METABOLISM",   new_assay = TRUE,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run metabolism pathway scoring — RunMetabolism
text: srt Seurat object. assay Assay use expression matrix. Default DefaultAssay(srt). group.Name metadata column group cells . NULL, single-cell scoring. provided, expression averaged group scoring (cell-type level). layer Data layer use, usually "counts" count matrix. db Databases use metabolism pathways. One "KEGG", "REACTOME". species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". method Scoring method, one "AUCell", "GSVA", "ssGSEA", "VISION". backend Scoring backend. "cpp" default supported methods. "r" uses original R package implementation. "cpp" currently supports method = "AUCell", method = "GSVA", method = "ssGSEA". method = "VISION" falls back "r" backend explicitly set. AUCell C++ scores may differ R backend tied expression values randomly ranked. cpp_strategy C++ AUCell ranking strategy. "sparse" ranks non-zero genes approximates zero ties, "topk" ranks genes can contribute AUCell AUC, "full" ranks genes. cpp_chunk_size Optional cell chunk size C++ GSVA kernels. NULL "auto" automatically chunks large matrices reduce peak dense intermediate memory; positive values set chunk size manually. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. assay_name Name assay store metabolism scores new_assay = TRUE. Default "METABOLISM". new_assay Whether create new assay metabolism scores group.= NULL. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run metabolism pathway scoring — RunMetabolism
text: Returns Seurat object. group.= NULL, stores scores assay assay_name tools. group.provided, stores tools slot Metabolism_<group.>_<method> MetabolismPlot.

title: Run Monocle2 analysis — RunMonocle2
code: RunMonocle2(   srt,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   group.by = NULL,   expressionFamily = "negbinomial.size",   features = NULL,   feature_type = "HVF",   disp_filter = "mean_expression >= 0.1 & dispersion_empirical >= 1 * dispersion_fit",   max_components = 2,   reduction_method = "DDRTree",   norm_method = "log",   residualModelFormulaStr = NULL,   pseudo_expr = 1,   root_state = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run Monocle2 analysis — RunMonocle2
text: srt Seurat object. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default "counts". group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . expressionFamily distribution family use modeling gene expression. Default "negbinomial.size". features character vector features use. Defaults NULL, case features determined feature_type. feature_type type features use analysis. Possible values "HVF" highly variable features "Disp" features selected based dispersion. Default "HVF". disp_filter string specifying filter use feature_type "Disp". Default "mean_expression >= 0.1 & dispersion_empirical >= 1 * dispersion_fit". max_components maximum number dimensions use dimensionality reduction. Default 2. reduction_method dimensionality reduction method use. Possible values "DDRTree", "ICA", "tSNE", "SimplePPT", "L1-graph", "SGL-tree". Default "DDRTree". norm_method normalization method use. Possible values "log" "none". Default "log". residualModelFormulaStr model formula specifying effects subtract. Default NULL. pseudo_expr Amount increase expression values dimensionality reduction. Default 1. root_state state use root trajectory. NULL, prompt user input. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run Monocle2 analysis — RunMonocle2
text: Seurat object Monocle2 analysis results added @tools slot.

title: Run Monocle2 analysis — RunMonocle2
code: if (interactive()) {   data(pancreas_sub)   pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub)   pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle2(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "SubCellType"   )   names(pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle2)   trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle2$trajectory    p1 <- CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle2_State",     reduction = "DDRTree",     label = TRUE,     theme_use = "theme_blank"   )   p1    p1 + trajectory    FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle2_Pseudotime",     reduction = "UMAP",     theme_use = "theme_blank"   )    pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle2(     pancreas_sub,     feature_type = "Disp",     disp_filter = "mean_expression >= 0.01 & dispersion_empirical >= 1 * dispersion_fit"   )   trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle2$trajectory   p2 <- CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle2_State",     reduction = "DDRTree",     label = TRUE,     theme_use = "theme_blank"   )   p2    p2 + trajectory    FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle2_Pseudotime",     reduction = "UMAP",     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) }

title: Run Monocle3 analysis — RunMonocle3
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. clusters cluster variable Seurat object use analysis. Defaults NULL, case use Monocle clusters used. graph name graph slot Seurat object use analysis. Defaults NULL, case Monocle graph used. partition_qval q-value threshold partitioning cells. Defaults 0.05. k number nearest neighbors consider clustering. Defaults 50. cluster_method clustering method use. Defaults "louvain". num_iter number iterations clustering. Defaults 2. resolution resolution parameter clustering. Defaults NULL. use_partition Whether use partitions learn disjoint graph partition. specified, user prompted input. Defaults NULL. close_loop Whether close loops graph. Defaults TRUE. root_pr_nodes root nodes order cells. specified, user prompted input. Defaults NULL. root_cells root cells order cells. specified, user prompted input. Defaults NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run Monocle3 analysis — RunMonocle3
code: if (interactive()) {   data(pancreas_sub)   pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub)   pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle3(     pancreas_sub,     reduction = "UMAP"   )    pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle3(     pancreas_sub,     reduction = "UMAP",     group.by = "CellType"   )   names(pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3)   trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$trajectory   milestones <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$milestones    CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_partitions",     reduction = "UMAP",     label = TRUE,     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) +     trajectory +     milestones   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_clusters",     reduction = "UMAP",     label = TRUE,     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) +     trajectory   FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle3_Pseudotime",     reduction = "UMAP",     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) +     trajectory    if (FALSE) {     # Select the lineage using monocle3::choose_graph_segments     cds <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$cds     cds_sub <- thisutils::get_namespace_fun(       "monocle3", "choose_graph_segments"     )(       cds,       starting_pr_node = NULL,       ending_pr_nodes = NULL     )     pancreas_sub$Lineages_1 <- NA     pancreas_sub$Lineages_1[colnames(       cds_sub     )] <- pancreas_sub$Monocle3_Pseudotime[colnames(cds_sub)]     CellDimPlot(       pancreas_sub,       group.by = "SubCellType",       lineages = "Lineages_1",       lineages_span = 0.1,       theme_use = "theme_blank"     )   }    # Use Seurat clusters to infer the trajectories   pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub)   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = c("Standardclusters", "CellType"),     label = TRUE,     theme_use = "theme_blank"   )    pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle3(     pancreas_sub,     clusters = "Standardclusters"   )    trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$trajectory   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_partitions",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     label = TRUE, theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory    CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_clusters",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     label = TRUE, theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory   FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle3_Pseudotime",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory    # Use custom graphs and cell clusters to infer   # the partitions and trajectories, respectively   pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(     pancreas_sub,     cluster_resolution = 5   )   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = c("Standardclusters", "CellType"),     label = TRUE   )   pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle3(     pancreas_sub,     clusters = "Standardclusters",     graph = "Standardpca_SNN"   )   trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$trajectory   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_partitions",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     label = TRUE, theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_clusters",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     label = TRUE, theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory   FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle3_Pseudotime",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory }

code: RunNMF(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunNMF(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   features = NULL,   nbes = 50,   nmf.method = "RcppML",   tol = 1e-05,   maxit = 100,   rev.nmf = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.name = "nmf",   reduction.key = "BE_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   cores = 0,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay' RunNMF(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   features = NULL,   nbes = 50,   nmf.method = "RcppML",   tol = 1e-05,   maxit = 100,   rev.nmf = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "BE_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   cores = 0,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay5' RunNMF(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   features = NULL,   nbes = 50,   nmf.method = "RcppML",   tol = 1e-05,   maxit = 100,   rev.nmf = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "BE_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   cores = 0,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunNMF(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   nbes = 50,   nmf.method = "RcppML",   tol = 1e-05,   maxit = 100,   rev.nmf = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "BE_",   verbose = TRUE,   cores = 0,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run NMF (non-negative matrix factorization) — RunNMF
text: object object. can Seurat object, Assay object, matrix-like object. ... Additional arguments passed RcppML::nmf NMF::nmf. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. features character vector features use. Default NULL. nbes number basis vectors (components) computed. Default 50. nmf.method NMF algorithm used. Currently supported values "RcppML" "NMF". Default "RcppML". tol tolerance convergence (applicable nmf.method "RcppML"). Default 1e-5. maxit maximum number iterations convergence (applicable nmf.method "RcppML"). Default 100. rev.nmf Whether perform reverse NMF (.e., transpose input matrix) running analysis. Default FALSE. ndims.print dimensions (number basis vectors) print output. Default 1:5. nfeatures.print number features print output. Default 30. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "nmf". reduction.key prefix column names basis vectors. Default "BE_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. cores number threads used RcppML functions parallelized OpenMP. 0, number threads automatically determined RcppML::setRcppMLthreads(). Default 0.

text: Run NicheNet analysis

title: Run NicheNet analysis — RunNichenetr
code: RunNichenetr(   srt,   group.by,   receiver,   sender = "all",   condition.by = NULL,   condition_oi = NULL,   condition_reference = NULL,   mode = c("aggregate", "aggregate_cluster_de", "custom"),   assay = NULL,   expression_pct = 0.1,   geneset = NULL,   background_expressed_genes = NULL,   top_n_ligands = 30,   top_n_targets = 200,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   lr_network = NULL,   ligand_target_matrix = NULL,   weighted_networks = NULL,   cutoff_visualization = 0.33,   lfc_cutoff = 0.25,   use_sender_agnostic_background = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run NicheNet analysis — RunNichenetr
text: srt Seurat object. group.Metadata column defining cell types. receiver Receiver cell type(s). sender Sender cell type(s). Use "" use non-receiver cell types. condition.Metadata column defining conditions. condition_oi Condition interest. condition_reference Reference condition. mode NicheNet wrapper mode. Supported values "aggregate", "aggregate_cluster_de", "custom". assay Assay use. expression_pct Minimum fraction cells expressing gene. geneset Optional target gene set mode = "custom". background_expressed_genes Optional background genes mode = "custom". top_n_ligands Number top ligands keep standardized summaries. top_n_targets Number top targets per ligand keep standardized summaries. species Species default NicheNet prior model loading. lr_network Optional ligand-receptor prior model path .rds file. ligand_target_matrix Optional ligand-target prior model path .rds file. weighted_networks Optional weighted network list path .rds file. cutoff_visualization Cutoff passed nichenetr::prepare_ligand_target_visualization(). lfc_cutoff Log fold change cutoff DE analysis "aggregate" "aggregate_cluster_de" modes. Default 0.25. use_sender_agnostic_background Whether use sender cell types sender = "". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run NicheNet analysis — RunNichenetr
text: Seurat object standardized NicheNet results stored srt@tools[["Nichenetr"]].

title: Run PAGA analysis — RunPAGA
text: PAGA graph-based method used infer cellular trajectories. function runs PAGA analysis Seurat object.

title: Run PAGA analysis — RunPAGA
code: RunPAGA(   srt = NULL,   adata = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   group.by = NULL,   linear_reduction = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = NULL,   basis = NULL,   n_pcs = 30,   n_neighbors = 30,   use_rna_velocity = FALSE,   vkey = "stochastic",   embedded_with_PAGA = FALSE,   paga_layout = "fr",   threshold = 0.1,   point_size = 20,   infer_pseudotime = FALSE,   root_group = NULL,   root_cell = NULL,   n_dcs = 10,   n_branchings = 0,   min_group_size = 0.01,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   legend.position = "on data",   cores = 1,   show_plot = FALSE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "paga",   dirpath = "./paga",   backend = c("cpp", "python"),   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run PAGA analysis — RunPAGA
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. adata anndata object. Default NULL. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". basis basis use reduction, e.g., "UMAP". n_pcs Number principal components use linear reduction. Default 30. n_neighbors Number neighbors use constructing KNN graph. Default 30. use_rna_velocity Whether use RNA velocity PAGA analysis. Default FALSE. vkey name RNA velocity data use use_rna_velocity TRUE. Default "stochastic". embedded_with_PAGA Whether embed data using PAGA layout. Default FALSE. paga_layout layout plotting PAGA graph. See layout param scanpy.pl.paga function. threshold threshold plotting PAGA graph. Edges weights threshold drawn. point_size point size plotting. infer_pseudotime Whether infer pseudotime. root_group group use root pseudotime inference. root_cell cell use root pseudotime inference. n_dcs number diffusion components use pseudotime inference. n_branchings Number branchings detect. min_group_size minimum size group (fraction total number cells) consider potential branching point. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. legend.position Position legend plots. Can "data", "right margin", "bottom right", etc. Default "data". cores number cores use cellrank. show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". backend Backend used compute PAGA. "cpp" uses native C++ implementation standard connectivity graph. "python" keeps original scanpy workflow RNA-velocity transitions, PAGA-initialized embeddings, plotting side effects, DPT pseudotime. return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

what: Single-cell reference mapping with PCA method — RunPCAMap
title: Single-cell reference mapping with PCA method — RunPCAMap
text: Single-cell reference mapping PCA method

title: Single-cell reference mapping with PCA method — RunPCAMap
code: RunPCAMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = srt_ref[[ref_pca]]@assay.used,   ref_pca = NULL,   ref_dims = 1:30,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean" )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with PCA method — RunPCAMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_pca character string specifying name PCA reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. NULL (default), automatically detected first PCA reduction. ref_dims numeric vector specifying dimension indices reference reduction used calculating distance metric. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

what: Run PHATE (Potential of Heat-diffusion for Affinity-based Trajectory Embedding) — RunPHATE
title: Run PHATE (Potential of Heat-diffusion for Affinity-based Trajectory Embedding) — RunPHATE
text: Run PHATE (Potential Heat-diffusion Affinity-based Trajectory Embedding)

title: Run PHATE (Potential of Heat-diffusion for Affinity-based Trajectory Embedding) — RunPHATE
code: RunPHATE(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunPHATE(   object,   reduction = "pca",   dims = NULL,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   n_components = 2,   knn = 5,   decay = 40,   n_landmark = 2000,   t = "auto",   gamma = 1,   n_pca = 100,   knn_dist = "euclidean",   knn_max = NULL,   t_max = 100,   do_cluster = FALSE,   n_clusters = "auto",   max_clusters = 100,   reduction.name = "phate",   reduction.key = "PHATE_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunPHATE(   object,   assay = NULL,   n_components = 2,   knn = 5,   decay = 40,   n_landmark = 2000,   t = "auto",   gamma = 1,   n_pca = 100,   knn_dist = "euclidean",   knn_max = NULL,   t_max = 100,   do_cluster = FALSE,   n_clusters = "auto",   max_clusters = 100,   reduction.key = "PHATE_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run PHATE (Potential of Heat-diffusion for Affinity-based Trajectory Embedding) — RunPHATE
text: object object. can Seurat object, matrix-like object, Neighbor object, Graph object. ... Additional arguments passed phate.PHATE. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. n_components number PHATE components. Default 2. knn number nearest neighbors build kernel. Default 5. decay sets decay rate kernel tails. Default 40. n_landmark number landmarks use fast PHATE. Default 2000. t power diffusion operator powered. sets level diffusion. "auto", t selected according knee point Von Neumann Entropy diffusion operator. Default "auto". gamma informational distance constant -1 1. gamma=1 gives PHATE log potential, gamma=0 gives square root potential. Default 1. n_pca number principal components use calculating neighborhoods. extremely large datasets, using n_pca < 20 allows neighborhoods calculated roughly log(n_samples) time. Default 100. knn_dist distance metric k-nearest neighbors. Recommended values: "euclidean", "cosine", "precomputed". Default "euclidean". knn_max maximum number neighbors alpha decaying kernel computed point. large datasets, setting knn_max small multiple knn can speed computation significantly. Default NULL. t_max maximum t test. Default 100. do_cluster Whether perform clustering PHATE embeddings. Default FALSE. n_clusters number clusters identified. Default "auto". max_clusters maximum number clusters test. Default 100. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "phate". reduction.key prefix column names PHATE embeddings. Default "PHATE_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run PHATE (Potential of Heat-diffusion for Affinity-based Trajectory Embedding) — RunPHATE
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunPHATE(   object = pancreas_sub,   features = SeuratObject::VariableFeatures(pancreas_sub) ) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   reduction = "phate" ) } # }

text: object object. can Seurat object, matrix-like object, Neighbor object, Graph object. ... Additional arguments passed pacmap.PaCMAP. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. n_components number PaCMAP components. Default 2. n.neighbors number neighbors considered k-Nearest Neighbor graph. Default 10 dataset whose sample size smaller 10000. large dataset whose sample size (n) larger 10000, default value : 10 + 15 * (log10(n) - 4). MN_ratio ratio ratio number mid-near pairs number neighbors. Default 0.5. FP_ratio ratio ratio number pairs number neighbors. Default 2. distance_method distance metric used. Default "euclidean". lr learning rate AdaGrad optimizer. Default 1. num_iters number iterations PaCMAP optimization. Default 450. apply_pca Whether pacmap apply PCA data constructing k-Nearest Neighbor graph. Using PCA preprocess data can largely accelerate DR process without losing much accuracy. Notice option affect initialization optimization process. Default TRUE. init initialization lower dimensional embedding. One "pca" "random". Default "random". reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "pacmap". reduction.key prefix column names PaCMAP embeddings. Default "PaCMAP_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run Palantir analysis — RunPalantir
code: RunPalantir(   srt = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   adata = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   linear_reduction = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = NULL,   basis = NULL,   n_pcs = 30,   n_neighbors = 30,   dm_n_components = 10,   dm_alpha = 0,   dm_n_eigs = NULL,   early_group = NULL,   early_cell = NULL,   terminal_cells = NULL,   terminal_groups = NULL,   num_waypoints = 1200,   scale_components = TRUE,   use_early_cell_as_start = TRUE,   adjust_early_cell = FALSE,   adjust_terminal_cells = FALSE,   max_iterations = 25,   cores = 1,   point_size = 20,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   legend.position = "on data",   show_plot = FALSE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "palantir",   dirpath = "./",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run Palantir analysis — RunPalantir
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". adata anndata object. Default NULL. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". basis basis use reduction, e.g., "UMAP". n_pcs Number principal components use linear reduction. Default 30. n_neighbors Number neighbors use constructing KNN graph. Default 30. dm_n_components number diffusion components calculate. dm_alpha Normalization parameter diffusion operator. dm_n_eigs Number eigen vectors use. early_group Name group start Palantir analysis . early_cell Name cell start Palantir analysis . terminal_cells Character vector specifying terminal cells Palantir analysis. terminal_groups Character vector specifying terminal groups Palantir analysis. num_waypoints Number waypoints included. scale_components cell fate probabilities scaled component independently? use_early_cell_as_start starting cell terminal group set early_cell? adjust_early_cell Whether adjust early cell cell minimum pseudotime value. adjust_terminal_cells Whether adjust terminal cells cells maximum pseudotime value terminal group. max_iterations Maximum number iterations pseudotime convergence. cores number cores use cellrank. point_size point size plotting. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. legend.position Position legend plots. Can "data", "right margin", "bottom right", etc. Default "data". show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run Palantir analysis — RunPalantir
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunPalantir(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP",   early_group = "Ductal",   terminal_groups = c("Alpha", "Beta", "Delta", "Epsilon") )  FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   c("palantir_pseudotime", "palantir_diff_potential") )  FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   paste0(     c("Alpha", "Beta", "Delta", "Epsilon"),     "_diff_potential"   ) ) } # }

title: Map query cells into a reference space — RunReferenceMapping

code: RunSCExplorer(   base_dir = "SCExplorer",   data_file = "data.hdf5",   meta_file = "meta.hdf5",   title = "SCExplorer",   initial_dataset = NULL,   initial_reduction = NULL,   initial_group = NULL,   initial_feature = NULL,   initial_assay = NULL,   initial_slot = NULL,   initial_label = FALSE,   initial_cell_palette = "Chinese",   initial_feature_palette = "Spectral",   initial_theme = "theme_scop",   initial_size = 4,   initial_ncol = 3,   initial_arrange = NULL,   initial_raster = NULL,   create_script = TRUE,   style_script = TRUE,   overwrite = TRUE,   return_app = TRUE )

title: Run SCExplorer — RunSCExplorer
text: base_dir base directory SCExplorer app. Default "SCExplorer". data_file name HDF5 file stores data matrices dataset. Default "data.hdf5". meta_file name HDF5 file stores metadata dataset. Default "meta.hdf5". title title SCExplorer app. Default "SCExplorer". initial_dataset initial dataset loaded app. Default NULL. initial_reduction initial dimensional reduction method loaded app. Default NULL. initial_group initial variable group cells app. Default NULL. initial_feature initial feature loaded app. Default NULL. initial_assay initial assay loaded app. Default NULL. initial_slot initial layer loaded app. Default NULL. initial_label Whether add labels initial plot. Default FALSE. initial_cell_palette initial color palette cells. Default "Chinese". initial_feature_palette initial color palette features. Default "Spectral". initial_theme initial theme plots. Default "theme_scop". initial_size initial size plots. Default 4. initial_ncol initial number columns arranging plots. Default 3. initial_arrange Whether use "Row" initial arrangement. Default TRUE. initial_raster Whether perform rasterization initial plot. default, set automatic, meaning TRUE number cells initial datasets exceeds 100,000. Default NULL. create_script Whether create SCExplorer app script. Default TRUE. style_script Whether style SCExplorer app script. Default TRUE. overwrite Whether overwrite existing data data file. Default TRUE. return_app Whether return SCExplorer app. Default TRUE.

title: Run scVelo workflow — RunSCVELO
text: scVelo scalable toolkit RNA velocity analysis single cells. function runs enhanced scVelo workflow Seurat object improved error handling, version compatibility, modular design.

title: Run scVelo workflow — RunSCVELO
code: RunSCVELO(   srt = NULL,   adata = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   group.by = NULL,   linear_reduction = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = NULL,   basis = NULL,   mode = "stochastic",   fitting_by = "stochastic",   magic_impute = FALSE,   knn = 5,   t = 2,   min_shared_counts = 30,   n_pcs = 30,   n_neighbors = 30,   filter_genes = TRUE,   min_counts = 3,   min_counts_u = 3,   normalize_per_cell = TRUE,   log_transform = TRUE,   use_raw = FALSE,   diff_kinetics = FALSE,   stream_smooth = NULL,   stream_density = 2,   arrow_length = 5,   arrow_size = 5,   arrow_density = 0.5,   denoise = FALSE,   denoise_topn = 3,   kinetics = FALSE,   kinetics_topn = 100,   calculate_velocity_genes = FALSE,   compute_velocity_confidence = TRUE,   compute_terminal_states = TRUE,   compute_pseudotime = TRUE,   compute_paga = TRUE,   top_n = 6,   cores = 1,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   legend.position = "on data",   show_plot = TRUE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "scvelo",   dirpath = "./scvelo",   backend = c("python", "cpp"),   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run scVelo workflow — RunSCVELO
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. adata anndata object. Default NULL. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". basis basis use reduction, e.g., "UMAP". mode Velocity estimation models use. Can "deterministic", "stochastic", "dynamical". fitting_by Method used fit gene velocities dynamical modeling. Default "stochastic". magic_impute Flag indicating whether perform magic imputation. Default FALSE. knn number nearest neighbors magic.MAGIC. Default 5. t Power diffusion operator powered magic.MAGIC. Default 2. min_shared_counts Minimum number counts (unspliced spliced) required gene. Default 30. n_pcs Number principal components use linear reduction. Default 30. n_neighbors Number neighbors use constructing KNN graph. Default 30. filter_genes Whether filter genes based minimum counts. min_counts Minimum counts gene filtering. min_counts_u Minimum unspliced counts gene filtering. normalize_per_cell Whether normalize counts per cell. log_transform Whether apply log transformation. use_raw Whether use raw data dynamical modeling. diff_kinetics Whether use differential kinetics. stream_smooth Multiplication factor scale Gaussian kernel around grid point. stream_density Controls closeness streamlines. density = 2 (default), domain divided 60x60 grid, whereas density linearly scales grid. cell grid can , , one traversing streamline. Default 2. arrow_length Length arrows. arrow_size Size arrows. Default 5. arrow_density Amount velocities show. denoise Boolean flag indicating whether denoise. denoise_topn Number genes highest likelihood selected infer velocity directions. kinetics Boolean flag indicating whether estimate RNA kinetics. kinetics_topn Number genes highest likelihood selected infer velocity directions. calculate_velocity_genes Boolean flag indicating whether calculate velocity genes. compute_velocity_confidence Whether compute velocity confidence metrics. compute_terminal_states Whether compute terminal states (root end points). compute_pseudotime Whether compute velocity pseudotime. compute_paga Whether compute PAGA (Partition-based graph abstraction). top_n number top features plot. cores number cores use cellrank. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. legend.position Position legend plots. Can "data", "right margin", "bottom right", etc. Default "data". show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". backend Backend used compute RNA velocity. "python" keeps original scVelo workflow. "cpp" uses package C++ implementation stochastic velocity embedding compatible VelocityPlot. return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
text: Run scTenifoldKnk -silico knockout analysis

title: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
code: RunscTenifoldKnk(   srt,   gKO,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   qc = TRUE,   qc_mt_threshold = 0.1,   qc_min_library_size = 1000,   qc_min_cells = 25,   nc_lambda = 0,   nc_nNet = 10,   nc_nCells = 500,   nc_nComp = 3,   nc_scaleScores = TRUE,   nc_symmetric = FALSE,   nc_q = 0.9,   td_K = 3,   td_maxIter = 1000,   td_maxError = 1e-05,   td_nDecimal = 3,   ma_nDim = 2,   cores = 1,   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   store_networks = TRUE,   store_manifold = TRUE,   tool_name = "scTenifoldKnk",   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
text: srt Seurat object. gKO Gene symbol symbols knock . genes must present optional feature QC filtering. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer Assay layer used count matrix. features Optional genes retain running network construction. supplied, gKO always retained present input assay. qc Whether apply scTenifoldKnk-style quality control. qc_mt_threshold Maximum mitochondrial read fraction per cell. qc_min_library_size Minimum library size per cell. qc_min_cells Minimum number expressing cells required per gene. nc_lambda, nc_nNet, nc_nCells, nc_nComp, nc_scaleScores, nc_symmetric, nc_q Network construction parameters forwarded scTenifoldNet::makeNetworks(). td_K, td_maxIter, td_maxError, td_nDecimal Tensor decomposition parameters forwarded scTenifoldNet::tensorDecomposition(). ma_nDim Manifold-alignment dimension forwarded scTenifoldNet::manifoldAlignment(). cores Number cores used native network-construction workers forwarded downstream linear algebra applicable. backend cpp native equivalent covariance-based network construction, direct sparse network assembly, controlled per-gene eigensolver parallelism, helpers tensor decomposition, manifold matrix construction, directionality, distance calculation. r calls scTenifoldKnk::scTenifoldKnk() directly comparison. store_networks Whether keep WT/KO tensor networks srt@tools. store_manifold Whether keep manifold-alignment coordinates srt@tools. tool_name Name srt@tools entry. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
text: Seurat object scTenifoldKnk results stored srt@tools[[tool_name]].

title: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
code: data(pancreas_sub) gene_use <- "Pdx1" counts <- GetAssayData5(   pancreas_sub,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "counts" ) detected <- names(   sort(Matrix::rowSums(counts > 0),   decreasing = TRUE) ) features_use <- unique(c(gene_use, head(detected, 300)))  pancreas_sub <- RunscTenifoldKnk(   pancreas_sub,   gKO = gene_use,   features = features_use,   qc = FALSE,   nc_nNet = 3,   nc_nCells = 200,   td_maxIter = 200,   store_networks = FALSE,   store_manifold = TRUE ) #> ℹ [2026-05-25 11:13:41] Run scTenifoldKnk knockout for "Pdx1" using "cpp" backend #> ℹ [2026-05-25 11:13:48] Construct scTenifoldNet network ensemble #> ℹ [2026-05-25 11:13:48] Denoise network ensemble with tensor decomposition #> ℹ [2026-05-25 11:13:48] Denoise network ensemble with tensor decomposition  ■■ … #> ℹ [2026-05-25 11:13:48] Align WT and KO network manifolds #> ✔ [2026-05-25 11:13:48] scTenifoldKnk results stored in `srt@tools[[scTenifoldKnk]]`  dr <- pancreas_sub@tools$scTenifoldKnk$diffRegulation head(dr) #>     gene     distance        Z         FC      p.value        p.adj #> 1   Pdx1 6.561133e-04 3.960035 7251.32977 0.000000e+00 0.000000e+00 #> 2   Cd81 7.531816e-05 2.333427   95.55631 1.437441e-22 2.163349e-20 #> 3   Myl6 3.422043e-05 1.851560   19.72563 8.939449e-06 8.969248e-04 #> 4  Actg1 3.355487e-05 1.840220   18.96580 1.330824e-05 1.001445e-03 #> 5   Ssr2 2.707015e-05 1.718221   12.34359 4.425038e-04 2.663873e-02 #> 6 Sec61b 2.486587e-05 1.670959   10.41519 1.249829e-03 6.269975e-02  scTenifoldKnkPlot(pancreas_sub, plot_type = "effect")

what: Annotate single cells using native SciBet — RunSciBet
title: Annotate single cells using native SciBet — RunSciBet
text: Run native scop implementation core SciBet classifier using labeled reference Seurat object.

title: Annotate single cells using native SciBet — RunSciBet
code: RunSciBet(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   ref_group,   query_group = NULL,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = NULL,   query_layer = "counts",   ref_layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   nfeatures = 1000,   additional_features_per_class = 0,   input_transform = c("auto", "none", "expm1"),   prefix = "scibet",   store_model = TRUE,   return_object = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Annotate single cells using native SciBet — RunSciBet
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref object class Seurat storing reference cells. ref_group character vector specifying column name srt_ref metadata represents cell grouping. query_group character vector specifying column name srt_query metadata represents cell grouping. query_assay character vector specifying assay used query data. Default default assay srt_query object. ref_assay character vector specifying assay used reference data. Default default assay srt_ref object. query_layer, ref_layer Assay layers used query reference. features Candidate features used SciBet. NULL, common genes query reference used. nfeatures Number entropy-test features selected features. additional_features_per_class Additional high-expression features selected per reference class. input_transform transform extracted values SciBet's internal log1p step. "auto" applies expm1 "data" layers transform otherwise. prefix Prefix metadata columns. store_model Whether store SciBet core probabilities srt_query@tools. return_object Whether return annotated Seurat query object. title: Single-cell reference mapping with Seurat method — RunSeuratMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_pca character string specifying name PCA reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_dims numeric vector specifying dimension indices reference reduction used calculating distance metric. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. normalization.method normalization method use. Default `"LogNormalize"`. reduction_project_method Dimensional reduction perform finding anchors. Default `"pcaproject"`. k.anchor many neighbors (k) use finding anchors. Default `5`. k.filter many neighbors (k) use filtering anchors. Set NA turn filtering. Default `200`. k.score many neighbors (k) use scoring anchors. Default `30`. k.weight Number neighbors consider weighting anchors. Default `100`. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref object class Seurat storing reference cells. query_group character vector specifying column name srt_query metadata represents cell grouping. ref_group character vector specifying column name srt_ref metadata represents cell grouping. query_assay character vector specifying assay used query data. Default default assay srt_query object. ref_assay character vector specifying assay used reference data. Default default assay srt_ref object. genes string containing "de", indicating markers calculated ref. back compatibility, string values allowed ignored deprecation warning. Alternatively, ref list, genes can either: list lists character vectors containing DE genes pairs labels. list character vectors containing marker genes label. ref list, genes can list length equal ref. element list one two choices described non-list ref, containing markers labels corresponding entry ref. de.method String specifying DE genes detected pairs labels. Defaults "classic", sorts genes log-fold changes takes top de.n. options "wilcox" "t", see Details. Ignored genes list markers/DE genes. sd.thresh Deprecated ignored. de.n integer scalar specifying number DE genes use genes="de". de.method="classic", defaults 500 * (2/3) ^ log2(N) N number unique labels. Otherwise, defaults 10. Ignored genes list markers/DE genes. aggr.ref, aggr.args Arguments controlling aggregation references prior annotation, see trainSingleR. quantile "quantile" parameter SingleR::SingleR function. fine.tune "fine.tune" parameter SingleR::SingleR function. tune.thresh "tune.thresh" parameter SingleR::SingleR function. prune "prune" parameter SingleR::SingleR function. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

text: Single-cell reference mapping Symphony method

title: Single-cell reference mapping with Symphony method — RunSymphonyMap
code: RunSymphonyMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = srt_ref[[ref_pca]]@assay.used,   ref_pca = NULL,   ref_harmony = NULL,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean" )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with Symphony method — RunSymphonyMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_pca PCA reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. ref_harmony Harmony reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

code: RunTriMap(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunTriMap(   object,   reduction = "pca",   dims = NULL,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   n_components = 2,   n_inliers = 12,   n_outliers = 4,   n_random = 3,   distance_method = "euclidean",   lr = 0.1,   n_iters = 400,   apply_pca = TRUE,   opt_method = "dbd",   reduction.name = "trimap",   reduction.key = "TriMap_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunTriMap(   object,   assay = NULL,   n_components = 2,   n_inliers = 12,   n_outliers = 4,   n_random = 3,   distance_method = "euclidean",   lr = 0.1,   n_iters = 400,   apply_pca = TRUE,   opt_method = "dbd",   reduction.key = "TriMap_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )

title: Run TriMap (Large-scale Dimensionality Reduction Using Triplets) — RunTriMap
text: object object. can Seurat object, matrix-like object, Neighbor object, Graph object. ... Additional arguments passed trimap.TRIMAP function. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. n_components number TriMap components. Default 2. n_inliers number nearest neighbors forming nearest neighbor triplets. Default 12. n_outliers number outliers forming nearest neighbor triplets. Default 4. n_random number random triplets per point. Default 3. distance_method character string specifying distance metric TriMap. Options : "euclidean", "manhattan", "angular", "cosine", "hamming". Default "euclidean". lr learning rate TriMap. Default 0.1. n_iters number iterations TriMap. Default 400. apply_pca Whether apply PCA nearest-neighbor calculation. Default TRUE. opt_method character string specifying optimization method TriMap. Options : "dbd", "sd", "momentum". Default "dbd". reduction.name character string specifying name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "trimap". reduction.key character string specifying prefix column names TriMap embeddings. Default "TriMap_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run UMAP (Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection) — RunUMAP2
text: object object. can Seurat object, matrix-like object, Neighbor object, Graph object. ... Additional arguments passed UMAP. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. neighbor name Neighbor object used. Default NULL. graph name Graph object used. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. umap.method UMAP method used. Options "naive" "uwot". Default "uwot". reduction.model DimReduc object containing pre-trained UMAP model. Default NULL. n_threads Num threads used. return.model Whether return UMAP model. Default FALSE. n.neighbors number nearest neighbors used. Default 30. n.components number UMAP components. Default 2. metric metric function used distance calculations. using string, available metrics : euclidean, manhattan. available generalized metrics : cosine, pearson, pearson2. Note triangle inequality may satisfied generalized metrics, hence knn search may optimal. using metric.function function, signature must function(matrix, origin, target) compute distance origin column target columns. Default "cosine". n.epochs number iterations performed layout optimization UMAP. Default 200. cores spread parameter UMAP, used automatic estimation /b parameters. Default 1. min.dist minimum distance UMAP embeddings, determines close points appear final layout. Default 0.3. set.op.mix.ratio Interpolate (fuzzy) union intersection set operation used combine local fuzzy simplicial sets obtain global fuzzy simplicial sets. fuzzy set operations use product t-norm. value parameter 0.0 1.0; value 1.0 use pure fuzzy union, 0.0 use pure fuzzy intersection. local.connectivity local connectivity, used construction fuzzy simplicial set. Default 1. negative.sample.rate negative sample rate UMAP optimization. Determines many non-neighbor points used per point per iteration layout optimization. Default 5. parameter UMAP optimization. Contributes gradient calculations layout optimization. left NA, suitable value estimated automatically. Default NULL. b parameter b UMAP optimization. Details see parameter . learning.rate initial value "learning rate" layout optimization. Default 1. repulsion.strength numeric value determines, together alpha, learning rate layout optimization. Default 1. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "umap". reduction.key prefix column names UMAP embeddings. Default "UMAP_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

code: SCENICPlot(   srt,   group.by,   tool_name = "SCENIC",   assay = "scenic",   layer = "data",   plot_type = c("rss_rank", "rss_heatmap", "rss_dotplot", "activity_heatmap",     "activity_violin", "activity_dim", "regulon_size", "network_graph", "network",     "target_bar"),   features = NULL,   reduction = NULL,   dims = c(1, 2),   top_n = 12,   activity_scale = FALSE,   rss_scale = FALSE,   heatmap_show_row_names = FALSE,   heatmap_show_column_names = FALSE,   heatmap_cluster_rows = TRUE,   heatmap_cluster_columns = FALSE,   heatmap_order = c("cluster", "group", "input"),   heatmap_row_names_side = "right",   heatmap_column_names_side = "top",   heatmap_row_names_rot = 0,   heatmap_column_names_rot = 45,   heatmap_border = TRUE,   heatmap_palette = NULL,   heatmap_palcolor = NULL,   heatmap_group_palette = "Chinese",   heatmap_group_palcolor = NULL,   heatmap_limits = NULL,   heatmap_args = list(),   max_targets = 20,   max_edges = Inf,   network_layout = c("fr", "nicely", "kk", "lgl", "drl"),   network_tf = NULL,   label_nodes = c("tfs", "all", "none"),   network_label_top_n = 60,   combine = TRUE,   ncol = 3,   return_data = TRUE,   title = NULL,   point_color = "#1F77B4",   top_color = "#DC050C",   point_size = 2,   point_alpha = 0.5,   highlight_tf = NULL,   highlight_color = "#7A0177",   highlight_point_size = 2,   highlight_linewidth = 0.5,   label_size = 3,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Plot top regulon specificity scores from SCENIC results — SCENICPlot
text: srt Seurat object containing SCENIC results RunSCENIC(). group.Metadata column used cell group annotation. tool_name Name srt@tools entry storing SCENIC results. assay Assay used fallback source regulon activity. layer Assay layer used fallback source regulon activity. plot_type Plot type. "rss_rank" keeps original regulon RSS rank plot. options summarize RSS, regulon activity, regulon sizes, TF-target subnetworks. features Optional TF/regulon names used activity, network, target plots. Values can match either "Sox9" "Sox9(+)". Explicit values resolved input order; duplicated regulons drawn . reduction Dimensional reduction used plot_type = "activity_dim". NULL, UMAP/tSNE/PCA-like reduction selected available. dims Two reduction dimensions used plot_type = "activity_dim". top_n Number top regulons labeled group. activity_scale Whether z-score regulon across groups plot_type = "activity_heatmap". default FALSE heatmap shows mean regulon activity collapse constant regulons zero. rss_scale Whether z-score regulon across groups plot_type = "rss_heatmap". Use rss_scale = TRUE, activity_scale = TRUE, heatmap_limits value RSS activity heatmaps use comparable row-wise relative scale. heatmap_show_row_names, heatmap_show_column_names Whether show row column names plot_type = "rss_heatmap" plot_type = "activity_heatmap". heatmap_cluster_rows, heatmap_cluster_columns Whether cluster rows columns SCENIC heatmaps. heatmap_order Row ordering strategy plot_type = "rss_heatmap" plot_type = "activity_heatmap". "cluster" keeps existing dendrogram-based order, "group" groups regulons group regulon reaches maximum heatmap value, "input" keeps resolved feature order. "group" "input" disable row clustering chosen order preserved. heatmap_row_names_side, heatmap_column_names_side Sides used row column names SCENIC heatmaps. heatmap_row_names_rot, heatmap_column_names_rot Rotation angles row column names SCENIC heatmaps. heatmap_border Whether draw heatmap borders SCENIC heatmaps. heatmap_palette, heatmap_palcolor Palette passed GroupHeatmap() FeatureHeatmap() SCENIC heatmaps. heatmap_palette = NULL, sensible default selected heatmap type. heatmap_group_palette, heatmap_group_palcolor Group annotation palette passed GroupHeatmap() FeatureHeatmap() SCENIC heatmaps. heatmap_limits Optional two-length numeric vector used color scale limits plot_type = "rss_heatmap" plot_type = "activity_heatmap". example, c(-2, 2) fixes z-score heatmaps legend range. heatmap_args Additional arguments passed GroupHeatmap() plot_type = "activity_heatmap" FeatureHeatmap() plot_type = "rss_heatmap". max_targets Maximum number target genes shown per TF/regulon network-style plots. max_edges Maximum number TF-target edges shown global network plots. Edges ranked absolute weight weight column present. network_layout Graph layout used network plots. "fr" matches force-directed Fruchterman-Reingold layout used Pando examples. network_tf Optional TF names used plot_type = "network". NULL, features, highlight_tf, top RSS regulons used. label_nodes nodes label network plots. network_label_top_n Maximum number high-degree TF nodes labeled plot_type = "network_graph" label_nodes = "tfs". combine Whether combine group plots patchwork::wrap_plots(). ncol Number columns used combine = TRUE. return_data Whether return RSS matrices ranking tables together plots. FALSE, plot object plot list returned. title Optional title added combined plot. point_color Color regulon rank points. top_color Color top regulon rank points. point_size Point size. point_alpha Alpha regulon rank points. highlight_tf Optional TF regulon names highlight every group plot. Values can match either TF regulon, example "Sox9" "Sox9(+)". highlight_color Color highlighted TF regulon points rank lines. highlight_point_size Point size highlighted TFs regulons. highlight_linewidth Line width highlighted TF regulon rank lines. label_size Text size top regulon labels. verbose Whether print messages. ... Additional arguments passed directly underlying GroupHeatmap() FeatureHeatmap() call plot_type "activity_heatmap" "rss_heatmap". example, width height can supplied directly.

title: Plot top regulon specificity scores from SCENIC results — SCENICPlot
text: list containing rss_matrix, rank_table, top_table, plots, plot return_data = TRUE; otherwise plot object list plots.

title: Plot top regulon specificity scores from SCENIC results — SCENICPlot
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunSCENIC(   pancreas_sub,   species = "Mus_musculus" )  scenic_rss <- SCENICPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "rss_rank" ) scenic_rss$plot example_regulons <- unique(scenic_rss$top_table$regulon)[1:2] example_tfs <- unique(scenic_rss$top_table$TF)[1:2]  SCENICPlot(pancreas_sub, group.by = "CellType", plot_type = "rss_heatmap") SCENICPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "rss_heatmap",   width = 2,   height = 3 ) SCENICPlot(pancreas_sub, group.by = "CellType", plot_type = "rss_dotplot") SCENICPlot(pancreas_sub, group.by = "CellType", plot_type = "activity_heatmap") SCENICPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "rss_heatmap",   heatmap_order = "group",   heatmap_cluster_columns = FALSE ) SCENICPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "rss_heatmap",   rss_scale = TRUE,   heatmap_order = "group",   heatmap_limits = c(-2, 2) ) SCENICPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "activity_heatmap",   activity_scale = TRUE,   heatmap_limits = c(-2, 2) ) SCENICPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "activity_violin",   features = example_regulons ) SCENICPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "activity_dim",   features = example_regulons ) SCENICPlot(pancreas_sub, group.by = "CellType", plot_type = "regulon_size") SCENICPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "network_graph",   max_targets = 10,   max_edges = 500,   label_nodes = "tfs" ) SCENICPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "network",   network_tf = example_tfs,   max_targets = 30 ) SCENICPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "target_bar",   features = example_regulons,   max_targets = 20 ) } # }

code: Scanorama_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   Scanorama_dims_use = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   return_corrected = FALSE,   Scanorama_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: The Scanorama integration function — Scanorama_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". Scanorama_dims_use vector specifying dimensions returned Scanorama utilized downstream cell cluster finding nonlinear reduction. set NULL, returned dimensions used default. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. return_corrected Logical indicating whether return corrected data. Default `FALSE`. Scanorama_params list parameters scanorama.correct function. Default `list()`. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: The Seurat integration function — Seurat_integrate
code: Seurat_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   scale_within_batch = FALSE,   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   FindIntegrationAnchors_params = list(),   IntegrateData_params = list(),   IntegrateEmbeddings_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: The Seurat integration function — Seurat_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". scale_within_batch Whether scale data within batch. valid integration_method one "Uncorrected", "Seurat", "MNN", "Harmony", "BBKNN", "CSS", "ComBat". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. FindIntegrationAnchors_params list parameters Seurat::FindIntegrationAnchors function. Default `list()`. IntegrateData_params list parameters Seurat::IntegrateData function. Default `list()`. IntegrateEmbeddings_params list parameters Seurat::IntegrateEmbeddings function. Default `list()`. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Spatial spot plot — SpatialSpotPlot
text: srt Seurat object. group.Metadata columns color spots . features Features color spots . provided, expression values read assay layer. assay Assay used features. NULL, default assay used. layer Assay layer used features. values Optional vector, matrix, data.frame spot-level values. Row names vector names must match spatial spot names. plot.data Optional long-format data.frame plotting repeated spatial points, cell--spot assignments. spot.Column plot.data containing spot names. color.Column plot.data used color repeated spatial points. geom Geometry used plot.data: "point" "jitter". image Name Seurat spatial image. NULL, first image used present. overlay_image Whether draw spatial image beneath spots. image.alpha Transparency spatial image. crop Whether crop panel plotted spots. coord.cols Metadata coordinate columns used image available. flip.y Whether reverse y axis metadata coordinates. split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. cells character vector cell names use. show_na Whether assign color color palette NA group. TRUE, cell points NA level colored bg_color. FALSE, cell points NA level removed plot. pt.size Point size. pt.alpha Point alpha. stroke Point border width. jitter_width, jitter_height Jitter size used geom = "jitter". palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. bg_color Point border color. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". legend.title Title legend. Default NULL, uses group name. theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. title: Transcript-averaged cell scoring (TACS) — TACSPlot
text: srt Seurat object. ref_srt Seurat object. dataset perturbed way substantially alter feature-feature correlations, example different time points present certain cell types mostly depleted, can feed reference srt, TACS choose axes based reference data. Default NULL. assay assay use. Default "RNA". layer layer use. Default data. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . feature1 Horizontal axis plot mimics feature. Character, usually length 1 possibly longer. feature2 Vertical axis plot mimics feature. Character, usually length 1 possibly longer. cutoffs given, divide plot four quadrants annotate percentages. Can numeric vector length 1 2, list two numeric vectors x y axes respectively. density TRUE, plot contours instead points. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". num_features_add axis shows simple sum similar features. many (removing overlap). features_predetermined FALSE, plot sum many features similar feature1 instead feature1 alone (feature2). See GetSimilarFeatures. TRUE, plot sum features given. aggregator combine correlations finding similar features. Options: "sum" (default), "min" (""-like filter), "max", "mean". remove_outliers TRUE, remove outliers plot. Default FALSE. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Default NULL. subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. suffix suffix axis labels. Default " expression level". legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). include_all TRUE, include panel cells. Default FALSE. all_color color cells panel. Default "grey20". quadrants_line_color color quadrants lines. Default "grey30". quadrants_line_type type quadrants lines. Default "solid". quadrants_line_width width quadrants lines. Default 0.3. quadrants_label_size size quadrants labels. Default 3. density_alpha alpha density plot. Default NULL. bins Number bins density plot. Default 20. h Bandwidth density plot. Default NULL. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. verbose Whether print message.
